title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
sample_texts: one of those forever RPG games, such cinema had to play it again on pc after playing it as a kid on my ps4, its a masterpiece. 10/10
when i got concussed a few years ago part of me did hope i would lose some of my memory just so i would get to replay this game like it was the first time ever

The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is one of the greatest RPGs ever made. The world feels alive, every choice matters, and even the side quests are written better than most full games. Playing as Geralt never gets boring thanks to the amazing characters, dark fantasy atmosphere, and emotional storytelling. The open world is massive and beautiful, filled with monsters, secrets, and unforgettable moments. The

I was not sure whether I would love this game as I was not familiar with the genre, but I've been hooked to this game ever since the 1st minute. Definitely one of the best games I've ever played! 10/10 for me.
할인하길래 그냥 밑져야 본전으로 사봤다. 밑지길 잘했다. 재밌다.! 여행하는 재미와 강렬한 스토리들. 나의 선택이 어떠한 방향으로 이끌지에 대한 흥미진진. 이러한 요소들이 위쳐를 나타내는거 같다.
사펑이랑 비슷하면서 다른맛. 확실히 재밌고 할 것도 많은데 뭔가 조작감이 살짝 불편한 감이 있어서 가끔 빡칠때도 있다. 게임성 자체는 최고.

Great game, though I wasn't a fan of the world design early on. Velen is a wretched and gloomy starting location. Toussaint, on the other hand, is a breathtakingly beautiful place. Roach is, without a doubt, the worst horse in all of gaming history and I wholeheartedly despise it. Don't be put off by the controls, they feel a little dated and unconventional at first but you do get the hang of them
Outstanding game! Great story. Fun at every turn. Absolutely beautiful - a work of art!
단돈 만원에 이런 알찬 게임을 즐겨도 되나 싶다. 위처4 나오면 정가주고 바로 구매해야징
게임은 재밌는데 자잘한 옛날게임이라 그런지 자잘한 버그가 많음. 그래도 스토리나 수집요소 등이 꽤나 훌륭함.그러나 멋있는 이펙트를 원하거나 정신없는 전투를 원한다면 비추. 할인할때 10000원주고 샀으니 할인할때 사면 개꿀인긴함.
GOAT, masterpiece, 10/10, peak, cinema, legendary, flawless, phenomenal, brilliant, perfect, breathtaking, a work of art, s-tier, elite
Winds howling. Your adopted daughter is missing and the world is ending. Anyway, do you want to play a card game? 10/10. Roach is currently on the roof
very good game thea gameplay and game mechanics are so fun till nowdays

I've played this game so many times.granted most of them were with pirated version but i grew and bought it after years. Man it doesn't matter how many times i've played it i always get the good feelings when i play it! And don't start me with the GWENT game.from the moment i played GWENT for the first time i wanted to have it in real life and play it with friends.and now i do have it and play it.
걍 스토리만 밀어도 재밌음 결만만 보고 끝냈다가 돌고돌아 재설치중
Best game in history. Don't need to say much else.
It's Witcher 3,what else do you need to know about this masterpiece.
Incredible game. Visually it still keeps up over a decade after release. Can't wait for the expansion in 2027
This is simply the best game of all time
Una obra maestra, uno de los mejores es la cuspide del arte del gaming del cine de todo lo que tenga que ver con artes visuales.

It still is and always will be one of the best RPGs of all time. The music, artwork, gameplay, story, characters, places - it is all so well designed and interconnected. I was lucky to play this with updated graphics and full DLSS and it is just a breathtakingly beautiful game. 10/10
재밌는데 키가 너무 불편해서 손가락 아파 포기한 최초의 게임.

Took me 11 years to play this game, and it still holds up after all this time. Seriously think this might be the best game I've ever played. Add it to your wishlist, pick it up on sale, or pay full price, whatever, you need to just play this game!

This is an older game by the time that I'm writing this but it still holds up for the most part. There's a bit of jank and the movement feels stiff, if youre a souls player like I am, but I still reccomend it. Lots of rewarding exploration and side quests to do, great game.

I only have 30 hours logged into the PC version of Witcher 3 but I started off on Xbox about 4 years ago and this is without a doubt, my favorite video game of all time. The story, gameplay and visuals are all 10/10 in my book and that's rare for a game to excel at all 3 of those categories. I will be playing WItcher 3 for a very long time.

im only 30hrs in and not even level 10 yet. Im happy with that though. the world, the main quest, the side quests all draw you in to enjoy the game. I have between skyrim and skyrim se over 1000 hours of play. this is a different game than skyrim. the combat is fun and engaging learning to take down certain opponents. even for a 10 year old game the texture update still makes it look great without
단점들을 보고 걱정했는데, 구매해서 해보았을 때 저는 단점이 느껴지지 않았고 재밌기만 했어요. 가장 어려운 난이도부터 시작해서 처음 전투에서는 고전했지만 스토리 따라가면서 좋은 것들 얻어가면서 진행하는 재미가 있었어요.
force EA to sell the rights of titanfall to cd projekt red so it can get an update after 10 years

리메이크 됐다는 소식 듣고 바로 시작했는데, 하다가 결국 접었다. 스토리는 확실히 잘 만든 편이다. 선택지도 다양하고, 진행하면서 계속 궁금해지게 만드는 힘이 있다. 세계관도 흥미롭게 잘 짜여 있어서 알아가는 재미는 있는 편이다. 근데 전투랑 조작감이 좀 아쉬웠다. 조작이 묘하게 불편하고, 전투도 손에 잘 안 맞아서 계속 하기가 힘들었다. 한 20시간 정도 버티면서 했는데도 적응이 안 됐다. 내 취향이랑 좀 안 맞은듯. 대도시 들어가고 나서는 더 버티기 힘들어서 결국 거기서 멈췄다. 스토리 때문에 끝까지 가보고 싶었는데, 플레이 쪽이 발목 잡은 느낌이다. 그래도 이야기나 세계관은 확실히 매력 있어서, 이런 부분 잘 맞는 사람들은 충분히 재밌게 할 수 있는 게임이다.
Ready to dive back into this masterpiece in preparing of the new expansion. CDPR is BACK BABY!
Bought the game for 9 bucks, feels like a robbery. Almost an 11 hour gaming session right off the bat, this game is so well made.. Witcher 4 better be as good!
사랑한다! CDPR! 위쳐 4 내는 거 불안하지만 기다리고 있다! 게롤트 엿은 먹이지 말아다오

I will preface this review by saying that whatever my playtime shows, you can add about 400 hours between switch and playstation, I have indeed played this game super religiously. Now, this game to me is like what all my friends that I had in elementary school thought of skyrim. It is an amazing fantasy game with plenty of room for buildcrafting and replayability and is an excellent entry point in

I might have only 18 Steam hours, but I also own this on GoG. Got it here very cheap for easier updates. Amazing game; the combat could be slightly better but is still fun, and so much content even without the expansions. Keeps getting love over the years, like the Ray Tracing update, and now a new expansion just got announced.
Played it a ton on PS4, now I'm switching over to PC and picking up my faves.
초반부 하고 있는데 퀘스트가 너무 꼬리 물기식이라 좀 지치는 경향이 큼

말해 모해요? 이만큼 잘 만든 게임은 찾아보기 힘들다구 생각합니다.(다 깨지는 않았지만.) 피의 남작 퀘스트 이후가 진짜라서 호불호가 조금 있을 거라고는 생각해요. 피의 남작 퀘스트까지는 이게 왜 그렇게 명작이라고 불리는 게임인지 저도 이해가 안됐었거든요. 그런데 가면 갈수록 더 재밌어지구 사소한 디테일 하나하나가 살아있어서 좋습니당. 다만 전투같은 경우 사알짝 불편한 점이 있었어요. 15년도 게임이라는 걸 감안해도 조금 더 부드럽게 할 수 있었을 거라고 생각하는데 이 점은 아쉽기는 합니다. 그 점만 제외하면 정말 잘 만든 게임이라고 생각해요. 강추드립니당. 26년 현재도 충분히 현역 게임들하고 비교해봐도 잘 만든 게임이라고 생각해용.

I pirated this game long ago when it came out. But I bought the copy 2 times to support the devs. Dear Devs: Please add a prompt to allow geralt to sit anywhere or sit in taverns or bonfires apart from meditating. I really enjoy just walking and admiring the environment. Love what you do!!
very fun. slaying monsters and chickens
Such a rich story and pleasing game play.
Story 10 Gameplay 10 But its so big and lacks just a ittle bit of info
transferred by 2020 save from ps4 thank you cdpr i give you my loyalty

A truly stunning epic that makes every quest feel unique and interesting, has one of the most engrossing narratives I've ever seen, and lives in a world unlike anything you've ever seen before. It's definitely story driven. It's not your typical hack-slash quest line game. Every quest is connected to a larger story line. After you battle, you are sometimes given an animated update of the main story. I do like that when you return, the game gives you a 'so far this is what has happened', which you could skip, if you don't need the information, but, it's nice for when you take a long break
Laba spēle , iesaku. Good game, I recommend it. The world here is well-developed, with interesting quests.
The best game you should play at least once in your life, no, YOU MUST!! Super recommended!!

DLC announced 11 years after release, my favourite game keeps getting better

Es una obra maestra por dónde se lo vea, el último juego que me hizo sentir así con sus decisiones fue Fallout New Vegas allá en 2010, y no creí que pudiera ser igualado. Respeta tus decisiones y muchas veces, sin saberlo estas alterando el rumbo de la historia. Una side quest que aparenta no tener efecto termina siendo mencionada mucho después y te quedas como "Ah, cierto que hice eso" o incluso
10년만에 새로운 확장팩이 나온다니 믿을 수 없다 플스에서 3회차까지 하고 PC판 샀지만 다시 달려야징ㅠ

기존 게임의 세계관이 소설 엔딩 이후를 잇는 형태이다 보니, 게임으로 처음 ‘위쳐’ 시리즈를 접한 사람들에게는 초반 진입 장벽이 있는 편입니다. 슬라브 신화를 기반으로 한 설정 역시 문화적 차이 때문에 스토리 전개가 다소 진부하게 느껴질 수 있고, 몰입에도 한계가 있습니다. 하지만 그 초반 구간만 넘기고 천천히 플레이하다 보면, 어느 순간 이 세계관에 깊이 빠져들게 됩니다. 오히려 예전에 이 ‘위쳐’라는 세계를 제대로 접하지 못했던 것이 아쉬움으로 남을 정도로, 그 서사의 깊이와 완성도에 감탄하게 됩니다. 결국 게임을 넘어 소설이나 다른 매체까지 찾아보는 자신을 발견하게 될 거입니다. 결단코 추천합니다!
This game set a standard for both the industry and myself. I have yet to find a story that has gripped me as tightly as this one did. CDPR built a masterpiece.
게임한지 100시간 넘었는데 너무 재밌어서 인생이 게롤트 됨 시리야 느이 엄마하고도 다시 집 합치기로 했으니까 얼른 돌아오거라 엄마가 너 많이 걱정하고 보고싶어한다

더빙은 좋고, 전투는 생각보다 지루하지 않고 할만함. 스토리도 재밌는데.. 하지만 날 미치게 하는 건 얨병 조작감이 너무 별로임. 로취는 좆만한 나무가지에 걸려서 계속 낑기고 3cm도 안되는 언덕에 개 쫄아서 급정지하는데 도저히 탐험할 엄두가 안남. 조금만 좁아져도 게롤트 코에 블랙헤드까지 보일 정도로 부담스럽게 화면이 가까워짐. 또 게롤트 이 새끼는 보드 타는 게 취미인지 능선이 조금만 기울어져도 타고 내려옴; 탐험하고 싶어도 이런 게 발목잡아서 스토리만 후딱 밀게 되더라. 하지만 불만을 갖기엔 게임이 오래되었으니 갓겜은 맞음.
집착에 가까울 정도의 스토리 및 퀘스트 라인이 엔딩을 미루게 만들 정도로 재미있는 게임! 다불은 라면 휘젖는 듯한 검술 타격감에도 불구하고 뉴게임 플러스로 다시 한번 마음이 설레여짐

4th playthrough and still finding new stuff. maybe this game isn't for anybody but it's a masterpiece nonetheless, even if you don't like it you have to appreciate it. Thank you for blessing us with this art projekt red.

Finally picked up this game after years sitting in my library (huge mistake). I’m currently midway through the main story and already finished the Hearts of Stone DLC. The writing is amazing, and some quests genuinely make you question your moral choices. My only issue is the loot scaling once you’re past level 30. Other than that, this is easily one of the best RPGs I’ve played. i will add more r

Bought the game way back when patch 1.0 was a thing slept on it for probably 8 years then finally decided to give it a whirl. Man talk about being late to a great party. 메인 퀘스트 엔딩 본 이후에야 궨트 등 다른 컨텐츠를 제대로 알게되었는데 꿀잼임. 메인 뿐 아니라 서브 컨텐츠들도 모두 재밌는 게임은 이 게임이 처음이었음. 강추함. 아 한가지 아쉬운건 전투 시 타격감이 그닥 좋지 않음

In my 29 years of gaming, I have never experienced anything even close to what The Witcher has to offer. The story, characters, combat, and above all, the soundtrack, are absolutely impressive. The side quests in this game are so rich that other developers could have released them as entirely separate games. I have played and loved a lot of other RPGs, like Fallout and Skyrim, but The Witcher sits

One of the best games I have ever purchased. I was never really into medieval era rpg game but this game somehow managed to ease me into really liking the gameplay and the story is the top tier with a few exceptions but if I didn't know the context from the books its a 10/10. Got it on sale along side the 2 expansions. Great game 10/10

Witcher 3 is pure immersion. The world pulls you in instantly, the story is incredible and full of memorable characters, and the combat, while simple, is fun and satisfying. It’s the kind of game you lose yourself in for hours without even noticing.

위쳐 시리즈를 먼저 소설로 접하고, 호수의 여인까지 다 본 독자로써 게임에 대한 기대감이 컸는데 그 기대감을 정말 잘 충족시켜준 게임, 후속작으로 나올 위쳐4가 정말 걱정이 될 정도로 잘 나온 작품. 잦은 선택을 요하나 피곤하진 않은 수준이라 오히려 매력으로 다가왔고, 캐릭터 하나하나가 입체적이고 매력적이다. 아직도 해보지 않은 게이머가 있다면, 할인할 때 사면 그 몇 배 이상의 재미를 줄 수 있을 거라고 확신하는 작품.
초반에는 엄청 잘 튕기고 최신 게임들을 몇개 해봤어서 내가 너무 이 게임을 늦게 했구나하고 별론데? 생각 했는데 하면 할수록 점점 빠져들게 되네요 게임이 고티인 이유가 있고 10년이 지났는데 아직도 회자되는 이유가 있다는걸 깨달았습니다. 최적화가 잘 안된 부분만 빼면 정말 수준 높은 게임입니다.
Once in a lifetime experience the world it feels like it will never end you always end up exploring something new.
8.5/10점 "기계적 결함을 덮어버리는 풍부한 서사" -장점- 각각의 매력적인 캐릭터들 몰입을 도와주는 한국어 더빙 흥미진진하고 몰입 되는 스토리 전개 잔잔한 오픈 월드 속 탐험과 힐링 되는 풍경들 -단점- 세밀하지 못한 행동 조작 (입력 지연) 모드 없이는 즐기기 힘든 낡은 그래픽 스토리 전개를 위한 노잼 전투 (타격감x, 이상한 판정, 입력 지연)
메인스토리, 서브스토리 할 것 없이 모두 깊이감 있는 서사를 풀어낸 게임. 그리고 이 둘은 톱니바퀴처럼 깔끔하게 맞물려 돌아가면서 굉장한 몰입도를 느낄 수 있었다. 뿐만 아니라 광활한 월드 속 잘 짜여진 레벨디자인으로 오픈월드의 교과서와 같은 면모를 보여준다.

개 족같은 조작감이 생각 안날정도로 스토리가 재밌다고 하는데 내가 제대로 몰입을 못해서 그런가 스토리는 생각안나고 게임내내 불편한 조작감 가지고 투덜내는 내모습밖에 안보임

Game is very pretty. Everything to do with the gameplay is just bad. The combat is terrible. LotR Shadows of mordor came out in 2014 and showed how it is done. The tracking quests got old very quickly. The crafting system is mostly an annoyance. I also didn't care about any of the characters. The dialouge is decent although it has way too much sarcasm and not nearly enough meaningful options.

Reviewing years later. I'll update this review if I manage to fix the save data bug and complete the game. I enjoyed reading most of the Witcher books and playing the previous games, even if some of the differences between the two mediums were jarring at first. Heading into Witcher 3, I was hyped to see how my carried-over choices from the last games affected this new one. Unfortunately, none of m

This is an amazing game dragged down by technical issues. The "enhanced" version can look pretty good but not good enough forgive the abysmal performance and constant crashing. On a 5070TI with DLSS set to "Balanced" on max settings the framerate will randomly go down to single digits in major cities. It's unplayable in those instances. This game should not run dramatically worse than games that a

I've been a fan of CDPR games for quite a while. Now they are breaking the trust by introducing new EULA to an 11 year old game. They want you to allow them to install spyware on your PC. That's a very ♥ move by a company we trusted for so long. Now I have to monitor every single process their games spawn hoping that I can stop them from spying on my machine before it's too late. Up until few days
New system requirements are BS. I paid for a certain product and now you lock it behind win11 and sh.. loads of other BS requirements.

It's an absurd value proposition for a game where every moment seems hand-crafted. It's not flawless, but the game's few faults won't diminish the growing return on your investment. Buy it and set aside some time.
The main storyline was fun to follow, and I always enjoyed playing the card game gwent.

Everyone talks about how witcher mutations are brutal because you don't feel emotions. Lies. The real mutation is that when you see a burning village full of crying orphans, your first thought isn’t 'how can I help them', but 'I bet the elder of this ♥ has a Hero card for the Northern Realms deck in his pocket.' My moral compass has failed, my card addiction has won. Highly recommended. 10 / 10 Sp

I finally played what many people call the GOAT of RPG's and I have to agree with them. From the story to the graphics, music, gameplay, and consequential decision making. All of it comes together to deliver this great game and for the age it is, it delivers. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a story driven action packed game!

15년도에 하고 더빙생겼대서 26년도에 또 해봤는데 재미있네요 차세대 패치? 그게 상당히 좋네요 근데 모드 매니저로 실행해서 그런가 26년도에 한 건 플탐이 기록이 안되네요 회차 돌렸으니 한 200~300시간은 될텐데 아무튼 그래픽도 상당히 괜찮고 단순하게 이게 선한 선택이라 생각한 게 반전으로 악한 선택이 되기도 하고 많이 재미있습니다 뭐든 단순하지 않아서 좋습니다.
전투는 아쉬울 수 있으나 게롤트와의 여정을 즐길수 있어서 행복했다 블러드 앤 와인은 무조건 필수
Amazing. Right after finishing the game I read all the books.
This game spoiled my RPG game taste, now I won't be able to enjoy any other game until W4.

If you like RPGs TW3 is a must play. The setting and the scenery that you can find within it are absolutely stunning, despite it being more than 10 yrs old. The story is nothing special to be honest, but the characters that you will meet and the quests related to them will make it worth it. This is true especially in the DLCs where the game improves in every aspect: quests, characters, combat, sto

This was my first experience with a Witcher game, but it's one of the most memorable RPGs I've played in a while. The side quests alone kept me engaged for dozens of hours. It's the kind of game you can really take your time and get lost in. Would play again.
one of my most cherished games of all time

I remember how excited I was leading up to the release of The Witcher 3. I watched the developer diaries style videos that CD Projekt released periodically in the months before the game released and I couldn't believe it was real, it seemed too good to be true at the time. Then May 2015 came and it completely blew me away. Does it have flaws? Absolutely, as any game does. The combat feels weightle
제 인생 게임 중 하나 입니다. 모두 완료 후 용량 때문에 지웠다가 2027년에 확장 팩 나온다 하여 다시 설치 중입니다. 추천합니다.
Very Immersive. Fun to be a sassy sarcastic brat to NPCs
This is new to me, and I like how the story goes.[spoiler][b] If I like it, I mean it. [/b]

10년동안 꺠야지 꺠야지 피의남작 구간까지 무한리세마라 하다 위쳐4 소식에 드디어 꺳음. 장점 비교 불허한 퀘스트 퀄리티: 단순 반복형 '유비식' 숙제가 아님. 사이드 퀘스트 하나하나가 메인급 서사를 품고 있어서 어디를 가도 이야기가 끊이지 않음. 혜자급 사후 지원과 현지화: 출시된 지 한참 됐음에도 차세대 그래픽 업데이트에 역대급 한국어 풀더빙까지. 몰입감이 차원이 다름. 돈이 아깝지 않은 분량: 햄버거 세트 가격으로 140시간(한 달 이상)을 꽉 채워 즐길 수 있는 압도적인 가성비와 볼륨. 전설적인 DLC: '하츠 오브 스톤'과 '블러드 앤 와인'은 단순 확장이 아니라 새로운 게임 하나를 더 하는 수준. 특히 투쌍 지역의 밝은 분위기는 최고의 반전임. 단점 호불호 갈리는 전투 시스템: 타격감이나 모션이

The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is a golden standard for RPG games and open world games. It has been said every time but the side missions are as meaningful, impactful as the main quests. The characters are well written and their is a history between everyone that you do have to catch up on but it feels like you are visiting a moment in these peoples lives. It's wonderful. It is however a 11 year old gam

One of the best games of the last 10 to 15 years. Two DLCs that significantly enrich the story and a third in development. CD Projekt RED's work is simply incredible. This game is well worth its full price 10 years after its release.
Great combat, quests, storyline. Absolutely loved it!
So nice of CDPR to include an open-world, RPG side content in their card game

이미 이 게임의 현재까지 모든 DLC가 출시된 이후 시점에, 아주 뒤늦게 이 게임을 시작하였는데, 이 게임을 하기 전에 많은 유저들로부터 이 게임이 명작 중의 명작이라는 찬사를 들었던 터라 과연 어느 정도로 재미가 있을지 굉장히 큰 기대를 하며 시작한 게임. 게롤트의 모든 여정을 플레이 했던 그 과정을 표현하자면 내가 이미 들었던 이 게임에 대한 찬사를 반복적으로 확인하는 과정과 같았음. 처음에는 조작감에 아주 살짝 불편한 점이 있었지만 익숙해지고 난 뒤에는, 그 어떤 단점도 볼 수 없었던 게임. 출시 이후 꽤 시간이 지났음에도 여전히 훌륭해 보이는 그래픽, 주요 퀘스트는 몰론, 부가 퀘스트조차 몰입하게 만드는 스토리의 탄탄한 짜임새, 많은 캐릭터들이 등장함에도 저마다 뚜렷이 구별되는 개성과 매력을 갖추다는
best story game that isnt from Japan and isnt a visual novel. Very good in every department

최근 게임 기준으로 해도 수작이라고 봄. 조작감 구리고 낡은 ui인 건 맞는데, 이게 약간 옛날 메이플 같은 맛이 있음. 불편해서 오히려 모험하는 느낌이 많이 든다 해야하나. 슥슥 넘어가면 할 땐 편하겠지만 1달만 지나가도 다 잊힐건데. 다만 동굴 탐험은 좀 빡침 맵이 어둡고 길이 잘 안 보임. 서브퀘스트랑 탐험요소가 많기는 한데 메인퀘스트만 즐겨도 충분한 볼륨이 나옴. 그리고 게임 스토리 좋다는 경우 대부분이, 게임 치고 겸사겸사 좋은 거지 순수 문학 작품한테는 밀리는 경우가 많은데. 위쳐3는 원작 소설 뛰어넘었다고 봐야함. 다양한 선택지가 있고 캐릭터랑 세계가 살아숨쉬는 게 활자로 전달할 수 없는 몰입감이 있음.

One of the best RPGS ever, with some of the best side quests I've ever seen. 60 some odd hours and I still haven't played the DLCs or done everything there is to do in the main game. Great story and characters as well, with some solid writing.
제가 기대했던 방식의 오픈월드 게임은 아니지만 서사가 좋고 캐릭터가 매력있고 음악과 디자인이 몰입하기에 아주 좋습니다. 한국어 더빙은 더더욱 좋고요. 전투가 조금 더 박진감 넘쳤으면 아주 완벽하지 않았을까 싶어요.

Absolute masterpiece. The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is not just one of the greatest RPGs ever made — it is one of the greatest games in gaming history. Everything about this game feels legendary. The world is breathtakingly beautiful, massive, alive, and filled with stories around every corner. From haunting swamps and destroyed villages to roaring cities and storm-covered islands, exploration never st

One of the first games I bought on this pc I recently built, I spent my 60 hours of doing the main story while also playing dozens of games of gwent (Highly recommend you try some gwent) I also near the end of them game, Killed 2/3 mean witch ladies called the crones, and I ended a big scary frosty knight (Eredin) Though all these hours I really enjoyed it, I'm about to start some DLCS but overall

Легендарная игра с огромным количеством контента: кучей дополнительных заданий, большими локациями, проработанным сюжетом и приятной боевой системой. Но почему-то, когда я перебрался на острова Скеллиге, игра меня немного задушила. 9 партий в Гвинт из 10.
너무 재미있게 한 RPG 선택지에 따라 스토리 분기되는것이 좋았다
Are the graphics slowly becoming outdated? Maybe. But it's one of the most atmospheric, well written and enjoyable RPG out there.

스토리 보는 맛으로 하는 게임 ㄱ같은 조작감은 아쉽지만 게롤트라는 인물이 드뎌 수십년간 이어진 긴 모험을 끝내고 휴식을 취할곳을 찾았다는거에 안심하고 게임을 끝낼수 있었음 ※소설부터 보고 하시는 분이라면 예니퍼 루트를 추천드립니다. 예니퍼루트가 스토리상 개연성과 목적이 맞기때문에 몰입이 잘될겁니다. 전 갠적으로 위처 4 나오는것도 좋지만 원작소설의 최종보스인 빌게포츠하고 싸우는 분기를 게임으로 만들었으면 합니다.
pipeline_summary:
The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt는 높은 퀄리티의 스토리, 전투, 그래픽, 사운드로 극찬을 받았습니다.
장점: 스토리의 힘이 강하여 끝까지 흥미롭게 플레이할 수 있었습니다. / 전투가 익숙해지고 나서는 매우 재미있었습니다. / 그래픽과 사운드가 완벽하다고 평가받고 있습니다. / 메인 후반부 핵심 요소 이후 다른 컨텐츠도 매우 재미있었습니다.
단점: 전투 시 타격감이 좋지 않았습니다. / 퀘스트가 꼬리 물기식이라 지치는 경향이 있었습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 오픈월드 RPG의 정점, 게롤트의 모험에 빠져들다

장점: 몰입감 넘치는 스토리 / 매력적인 캐릭터 / 방대한 오픈월드 탐험 / 다양한 선택지와 결과 / 높은 그래픽 퀄리티

단점: 다소 불편한 조작감 / 전투의 반복성 / 오래된 게임이라는 점에서 오는 한계

title: Dead by Daylight
sample_texts: My therapist said I should find a hobby to release stress. Now I hunt people in cornfields. 10/10, much cheaper than therapy.
DBD is fun to play with friends, but ♥ it is miserable when solo-queuing.
뉴비인 내가 어벙하게 잡히면 탈출구까지 업어주는 살쌤들 꽤 많았슴 불쾌한 사람도 있지만 좋은사람도 있는걸 깨달음 유튭에서만 보던 고아수용소 이미지랑은 꽤 달랐다. 근데 발전기 너무 빨리 켜져서 좀 당황스러워잉
Fun ass game but getting tunneled by 2 killers is NOT fun

I also don’t know any other game where Geralt of Rivia, Eleven, Nicolas Cage, and Leon S. Kennedy can end up in a Scooby-Doo-style chase scene from Ghostface or some failed K-pop idol having a manic episode with a baseball bat and a concerning number of knives. Every match is a delicate balance between peak euphoria and wanting to uninstall this ♥ game. 10/10.

I’ve been playing Dead by Daylight for quite a while. I originally had 993.4 hours on Epic Games, but I switched to Steam, where I currently have 49.5 hours. The main reason I moved was because achievements on Epic were often delayed or didn’t work properly, which was really frustrating. On Steam, everything works smoothly and reliably. As for the game itself, it still has its issues. Matchmaking
so fun! love tunnelers! very fun and i definitely don't hate this game! i definitely reccomend this to everyone! also i LOVE how fun this game is did i mention
Real Fun to Stab friends. big learning curve. Sometimes toxic community.
real high highs reallll low lows
술래잡기 게임에 ㅈ,.저.,.정..여기까지 말 하겠습니다, 재미는 있습니다.
its a great game. just dont take it or yourself too seriously and you will have tons of fun
So excited for Jason! The livestream was a little unorthodox but theorizing with the community was a blast!

In my opinion, they should bring back the old ranking system. These days, you can play for a few hours and hit red ranks pretty easily, and there's not really any punishment for playing badly. Back then, if you had a bad game, you could lose pips, which made climbing the ranks feel more rewarding and actually meant something. I think bringing that back would make the game a lot more fun for compet
i love this game especialy for the colabs i like how they all work and i give this game 10 out of 10
Amazing game love the horror its a fun thrill
this game is like a love letter to hoorer so many cool orignal characters and ips im exited to see what comes next
It's pretty fun. Dunno why ppl say community is toxic. So far everyone seems nice. And I let go 1-2 survivors so everyone is happy
Its a good game but i wish there was a way to earn premium currency without spending money so this game isnt locked behind a pay wall.
absolutely one of the most painful experiences ive ever had playing a game but its amazing
i finally understand why ppl get addicted to this game.

Can we get rid of the bully squad issue dude. When its late at night and I wanna play killer every match is a an all flashlight bully squad. I'm a low level player why am I getting matched up with an Ada Wong flashlight bully squad!!
This is simply the best survivor killer game there is, not much to say about it.
I have had the game for two days now and have already put almost 10 hrs in this game is SUPER addictive if your into horror
hate how much killers have been buffed and how easy the maps are for the killer to much added to the game miss when it was simpler and maps were bigger
입문한지 얼마 안된 초보긴한데 재미는 있음 대신에 튜토리얼이라던가 이런게 너무 알려주는게 없음
its good even thou u cant play with ur fav character without paying so much

Ive been playing this game for about a decade now, I played on multiple platforms and its a game I still come back to often. It doesnt get boring easily, its fun to play alone or with friends. The game has updates often enough that it doesnt get repetitive to me either
살인마로 겜 시작하지 마십쇼. 세상에 악의가 그득그득한 사람이 얼마나 많은지 깨달을 수 있습니다.

really good game and performance on my specs. I can get a stable 30 fps which is not bad at all, i can play on medium settings with no stress but i prefer low for more fps in tight situations. the game is very toxic but i like that. 10/10
Started playing DBD in 2024 on console. Love it so much! Best asymmetrical horror game out there! <3
this game is horrible and has the worst balance ive ever seen but i cant stop playing
숨바꼭질 게임이라고 하면 재밌는데. 그거 말곤 특별히 재미가 없어요.
hate myself lots spent lots but you know what I love trapper and wish he'd put me in a trapped position maybe with him and Jason just back and forth (good game for insanity loss)

Dead by Daylight is a love hate relationship. Its a lot of fun playing as Springtrap but the game causes rage at times. I reccomend this game if you dont have extreme rage issues.

honestly, super great game to play with friends. takes some time to learn ofcourse, but once you get the hang of it, its fun!

솔직히 이 게임의 가장 큰 노잼 이유는 다양성 없는 킬러들임 특히 이거의 대표 킬러가 식구(마이클 마이어스)임 묘비 식구, 거울 식구, 무한 식구 등등 재미 요소가 많았는데 사기라는 이유로 팔다리를 자르다 못해 심장을 뽑아감 유틸이라는 명분으로 재미를 완전히 뺏어가는데 웃긴건 묘비 식구는 사기라고 하기엔 준비시간과 파훼법이 분명하다는거임 무한 식구는 그 당시 게이지 한계가 있던걸 생각하면 정당하다고 봄(심지어 이것도 게이지 필요량 증가함) 그럼 다른 킬러들 봐보자, 재미? 뭐 어떤건 날리고 어떤건 이동하고, 끝 진짜 끝, 더 없음 이게 맞다고 보나? 뭐 참신할게 딱히 없고 재밌는것도 한정적인데 그 마저도 이놈들은 그 재미도 아니꼽게 봄 맨날 킬러 너프너프너프 심지어 최근에 스트리머들 사이에서 다시 유행하니까
genuinely the worst game I've played in my life but its like crack and i cant stop

I first played DBD mobile for 2 years and then switched to the PC version once I got a laptop and I will 100% recommend this game. I am a survivor main and let me tell you it really is a lot of fun a bit frustrating (as all team games are) but very fun

this community is so nice and helpful, i got a lot of tips on how to uninstall the game and kill myself :D

This is the most anti-beginner friendly game that exists across any game ever. Dead by Daylight is a missed opportunity. Despite an intriguing concept, the final result is flawed by a lot of small problems. You could still enjoy it, but in order to do so you should get over a terrible netcode, a grind-based progression system, and all too random rewards.

Disastrous scoring system encourages some players to cooperate with the killer instead of running from him and reduces promising gameplay to nonsense (e.g. when the killer picks you up, throws you into a trap, resets it, picks you up, throws you into a trap, resets it, picks you up, throws you into a trap, resets it, picks you up.). [09/2016, p.58]
None of this stops Dead by Daylight from being enjoyable at times—or even tense—but a horror experience it is not. Nor is it particularly well fleshed out, well documented, or even well executed.
Dead by Daylight executes the concept of a competitive horror game well, but only to a point.

The idea is great and it's really intense and fun when played with friends. However, it's not the most polished experience, so it might be worth waiting and seeing how it improves in the upcoming months.
Dead by Daylight has innovative and interesting gameplay based on a multiplayer 4 vs 1 and has a great horror atmosphere but it needs more content from now on.

Dead by Daylight can be scary for the victims and satisfying for the hunter, but lack of variety in game modes makes it repetitive after a dozen or so hours, especially if we don't have a group of friends ready for bloody competition.
Dead By Daylight is a fantastic concept that, in practice, needed much more work put into it.
Despite of lack of content in its launch, Dead by Daylight is an original adventure multiplayer game that it is worth and captures perfectly the style of classic movies of horror.
It lacks polish, but Dead by Daylight is a genuinely tense ode to 80s slasher movies.

pipeline_summary:
친구들과 함께 플레이하는 것이 재미있다는 반응이 있습니다.
장점: 친구들과 함께 플레이하면 매우 재미있습니다. / 발전기를 돌리다 심장 소리를 들으면 현실의 심박수도 함께 올라가는 경험을 제공합니다. / 초보자도 즐길 수 있는 매우 즐거운 게임이며, 쉬운 진행 장벽과 강력한 성능을 가진 캐릭터를 추천합니다.
단점: 게임이 초보자를 고려하지 않는 구조로 인해 새로운 플레이어를 위한 콘텐츠가 부족합니다. / 유료 캐릭터를 구매하지 않으면 원하는 캐릭터로 플레이할 수 없습니다. / 버그와 핵 문제로 플레이에 지장을 받을 수 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 데드 바이 데이라이트는 비대칭 멀티플레이 게임으로, 살인마와 생존자의 대결을 기반으로 하며, 플레이어는 협력과 전략을 통해 생존하거나 살인마로서 생존자를 처치하는 것을 목표로 합니다.

장점: 
- 다양한 캐릭터와 협력을 통한 전략적 플레이 / 비대칭 게임 방식으로 인한 긴장감과 스릴 / 꾸준한 업데이트와 다양한 콘텐츠 제공

단점: 
- 게임 내 커뮤니티의 독성과 낮은 매칭 품질 / 복잡한 게임 메커니즘으로 인한 높은 진입 장벽 / 과금 유도 시스템으로 인한 불만

title: A Plague Tale: Innocence
sample_texts: 망해버린 세상에서 금쪽이 키우기 버그가 좀 있고 억까들이 좀 있지만. 잔잔히 스토리 보면서 하기에는 아주 좋은 게임이네요. 특히 여주인공 성우 연기력이 아주 좋음!

A Plague Tale: Innocence feels less like a game and more like a quiet descent into a dark fable. The story moves with a suffocating tension, where every step through plague-ridden fields and shadowed villages feels heavy with fate. Like something out of Dostoevsky or Kafka, the world is cruel, indifferent, and deeply human all at once. Recommended!

story is top notch, makes me attached to the characters. good audio visuals makes the game atmosphere even more immersive, especially with iem. only issue i ran into was LT and RT couldn't be pressed simultaneously, didn't know why so i had to aim with mouse. if u're into story driven games, just play it. 9/10

Got it on sale. Great value. Good cinematic game. Will i play it again? probably not but will recommend it to buddies for sure and then watch them play it. Game play is simple and intuitive for the most part. Graphics are great. Story is good. Great for casual players who want to experience a story and not make their own. Played it on a Legion Go1 w bazzite

I just finished A Plague Tale: Innocence with about 10.8 hours of playtime, unlocking 31 out of 35 trophies. I’m not going for 100% since what’s left is mostly collectibles, and that doesn’t really interest me. Overall, I really liked the game, but I also clearly felt that it has aged a bit. Graphically, it’s still decent and the artistic direction carries a lot of the experience, but you can tell

A nice story with some casual but engaging gameplay. There are a lot of moments where it feels like characters do stupid things because the writing is thinking more about the function than logic. This makes Hugo a frustrating character in the beginning, as well as many things happening in the first act feeling very forced and inorganic. That said, it's a beautiful game and a pretty nice story to f

할인할 때 2만원대에 레퀴엠이랑 같이 주는 패키지로 구매했습니다 마지막에 아미시아랑 휴고가 같이 노는 모습을 보면 휴고는 그저 귀엽고 평범한 어린 애기일 뿐인데 .. 스토리 상 그렇게 휘말렸을 뿐인데 .. 하는 생각이 더 많이 들고 휴고가 발암이라기보다는. 시간이 지나며 살인기계 폭주기관차가 되어가는 아미시아.. 어쩌다 한 방 잘못맞으면 그대로 사망하는 아미시아 . 게임 시스템적으로 컨트롤이나 다양한 루트로 클리어하기보단 주어진걸 잘 수행해내면 빠르게 넘어갈 수 있다보니 게임플레이나 수집은 드라마를 보다가 중간중간 몰입할 수 있게 도와주는 장치일 뿐 .. 어쨌뜬 캐릭터들도 상당히 입체적이고 몰입감있는 스토리와 전개라서 굉장히 재미있게 플레이 했습니다 추천추천 아 그리고 그래픽도 되게 좋아요 뭔가 나중에 라오

A hauntingly beautiful story, in the midst of the most grotesque and sad world. This has good story, simple mechanics, good puzzles and a reason to hate and at the same time love [spoiler] rats [/spoiler] Game is worth the price, the experience is good. But I wouldn't put myself through to this again. Quite a few teary moment on the game as well, so you'll definitely have fun too. Give it a try. I
스토리 및 그래픽은 몰입이 될 정도로 잘 만들어진 것 같습니다. 근데 플레이시간이 많이 짧은 편이네요. 전투는 대부분 잠입/암살.

Amazing game. - Very innovative gameplay - Good degree of difficulty, not boringly easy, not boringly hard - Amazing graphics, especially for 2019 - Amazing body dynamics - example: characters carefully walk on corpses! finding places to put their feet! - Very heart-touching story, full of emotions I won't say anymore! Go discover yourself!
잘만들긴했음, 스토리보는 게임임 그래픽과 스토리를 뺀다면 되게 별거없음
It is worth the time and money spent, music, aesthetics, plot. And you don't get hours of fillers in the game, every gaming session feels unique
.뛰어난 게임성과 사운드 .매력적인 세계관 .수준높은 그래픽 .흥미로운 서사 .금쪽같은 내새끼
good game, a lot of the same elements as The Last of Us which i love.
연출이 훌륭함. 게임난이도도 적당해서 스트레스 받을 일도 적음.
짱돌이 세상을 지배한다.. 아미시아 이뻐서 더 재밌게함 쥐가 이렇게 무서운 존재였나..

기대이상으로 퀄리티가 상당한 작품 난이도도 적절하고 뭔가 보이스한 여자 주인공도 매력있다. 감염쥐와 병사들과의 전투가 꽤 재밌다. 죽어도 실시간으로 계속 저장해주는 저장시스템도 재미에 한몫한다. 스토리도 훌륭하고 그래픽도 좋다. 하지만 한가지 마음에 안드는건 챕터 배분이 아쉽다. 어떤챕터는 영상 하나보고 깔짝 움직여주면 챕터가 끝나버리는데 챕터 분량조절만 잘했어도 더욱 좋았을듯하다. 챕터10개정도로 줄이고 영상과 게임 시간분량이 적절했으면 하루에 한챕터씩 하기 좋았을것같다. 무기계승 시스템은 없는듯한데 다회차 플레이를 노리는사람들이면 이부분도 아쉬운부분. 평가 : ★

Good story and great gameplay however they need to work on guides because at times you can get lost on what you need to do or where you need to go. Also there are a few bugs out there but they are fixable by watching yt or going on reddit so i rate it a 4/5.

휴고가 트롤이다? -> 그냥 나이에 답게 엄마를 찾을 뿐임 아미시아가 트롤이다?-> 사춘기 소녀답게 친구도 사귀고, 동생도 잘 챙기고, 사춘기인 자신보다 숨기는게 많은 엄마도 사랑함. 애me가 트롤이다? -> 사교도 연금술사년이 아들 병 고친답시고 -가족도 못 믿어서 아들에 대한 중대한 진실 숨김. -맨 처음에 문에 칼 들어왔을 때, 애들한테 문넘어로 "엄마는 괜찮아!"이거 하나 하기 싫어서 이 사단 만듦. -결국 아들내미가 구하러왔는데 쳐 나가지도 못할 거면서 깝침. -어린 아들이 지 구해보겠다고 ㅈㄴ 괴로워하고 있는데 그 와중에 한다는게 보스랑 ㅈ도 말도안되는 쇼부치고 자빠짐. -겸사겸사긴 하지만 이년 구하겠다고 남의 집 귀한자식들도 몇 죽음. -쳐 구해줄라고 ㅈ같은 기믹 깨가면서 와줬더니 "힘을 남용하
플레이 타임이 짧고 뒷부분이 너무 빠르게 진행된다는 느낌을 받는다는것 제외하곤 나머지 다 너무 좋은 게임
Easy recommendation for everything but the gameplay. Acting, atmosphere, storytelling, worldbuilding, art direction, etc. All top notch. This game will stick with you.
Strong game. Good graphics and I liked the story. Original
씹 T 인 내가 진짜 동생이 있어서 그런가 모르곘지만 정말 많은 생각을 하면서 한 게임중에 하나임 형 입장으로서 정말 많이 몰입하면서 게임을 했는데 2번째 작품이 정말 기대되는 게임임
스토리 만족도가 생각보다 높고 스토리 처음부터 끝까지 암살 및 탈출 스토리라 퍼즐요소가 많음. 게임하면서 머리 쓰는 거 싫어하는데 이 정도 난이도면 할만함.
It has a nice story and you can really feel the thrill while playing because of the breathing and reactions of each characters during gameplay and cut scenes. :)
A fantastic great with unique gameplay mechanics, great character development and story throughout. 10/10
Unique gameplay, exiting story and gorgeous graphics!
쥐 별로 무서워하지 않았는데 이 겜 하고 나니 쥐가 제일 극혐이었다.
All the story graphics were perfect and the difficulty was easy, so I had fun. It's not difficult to operate. If you're going to play this game, you can really enjoy it if you look at the story.

Played this game after playing plague tale requiem. who would of thought it gives the whole background story, basis and explanation of the game/storyline. It leads up to the second game and gives so much in-depth detail to the story line. You can play the second game without playing this but playing this gives a more immersive game play experience.

Gameplay Stealth simple dan mudah dipahami dengan teka-teki yang juga seru untuk dipecahin. cinematography-nya behhh cakep bet, enak untuk dilihat, didukung grafik yang ok banget untuk zaman sekarang, atmosfer yang dibangun menggambarkan zaman kerajaan 1300-an zaman pandemi banget, jadi terasa hidup banget ni game. Tapi yang menjadi nilai plus banget tuh ceritanya nya, dari kakak adek yang nggak p
Voice acting is good controls are smooth. I like the game play
게임은 재밋는데 버그 때문에 한 장소에 갇혀서 뭘 할수도 없음;
Interesting way of playing, less frantic, more about being sneaky. Nice story, waiting for playing the sequel.
Abosoutely fantastic game. the story is also very beautiful
어우 페스트균 걸릴거 같아 쥐 존나 많이 나와서 밥먹고 하면 안되는 게임

A Plague Tale: Innocence is one of those rare experiences.a haunting story with depth, despair but also with glimpses of hope. It’s pure survival through fear and love as Amicia and Hugo cling to each other in a dark world that feels completely broken. A plague ridden medieval France is the perfect dark setting that really adds well to the despair in this world. There is beauty in all the decay ar
Basically The Last Of Us but medieval and with rats instead of mushrooms. Fortunately I really like both The Last of Us and medievalism so it worked for me

It's a good game and I did enjoy it. The story is unique that keeps you engaged. Voice acting, music and graphics are great. It has emotional and touching moments. The game has bugs, so anytime you come across one or get stuck, just set the resolution scale to 200% under graphics setting. Thank me later. The game is generally easy, but there is a difficulty spike during the last chapter or two. I'

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a truly memorable experience that left a strong impression on me. The game features beautiful graphics that perfectly capture the dark, medieval atmosphere of France infected by plague. Every location feels detailed and alive, despite the overwhelming sense of danger. What really stands out is the incredible atmosphere. The constant tension, enhanced by the haunting mus
Crazy? I was crazy once, They locked me in a room, a rubber room, a rubber room with rats, and rats make me crazy. Great game, had fun!
휴고 죽탱이를 좀 돌리고 싶었지만 재밌게 했습니다. 후반부에 스토리가 급 전개 되는거 같은 부분은 좀 아쉽네요 출시하자 마자 구매했으면 정가로 주고 사기 아쉬운 게임은 아니지만 벌써 2025년이니 세일할때 번들로 사는걸 추천합니다.

Really good introduction to the series :) I really enjoyed this game because it can be wholesome besides the dark parts of it. Every character is great in their own way, especially Hugo and Amicia. The story is awesome and the music is amazing too, Olivier Deriviere did an amazing job. The graphics are really good too and the game is well optimized. I highly recommend this game because its pretty

[h3] 한편의 그래픽 노블과 같은 게임 [/h3] 직접 조작도 하고 전투도 존재하지만 한편의 잔혹동화를 보는듯한 작품으로, 전반적인 플레이가 어렵지 않고 감상하는 느낌으로 플레이 가능. 꼼꼼하게 탐사한다면 구석구석에서 숨겨진 보물이나 제작용 아이템을 얻을 수 있도록 만들었지만 전반적으로 선형적인 구조를 가지고 있다. 감상하는 느낌으로 플레이하기 좋음. [h3] 장점 [/h3] 볼만한 스토리, 분위기를 살려주는 음악과 음향, 어렵지 않으면서도 적당히 머리는 굴려야하는 퍼즐 등 플레이 전반이 잘 짜여져 있고, 분량이 길지 않아 10시간 남짓이면 클리어 가능. 때때로 분량이 너무 짧아서 아쉬운 경우도 있지만, 감상적인 성격이 강한 본작은 딱 적당한 길이라고 느껴진다. [h3] 단점 [/h3] 투명벽 버그가 종종
A brilliant game - cinematography, music, narrative, gameplay, systems and pacing all form a perfect mix with no bloat

I played this partly for the story, but stayed for the atmosphere. The stealth-based exploration is wonderful. As a Bordeaux native, I was blown away by the level of detail and the inspiration taken from my city. Seeing "La Grande Cloche" in-game was such a cool moment! It isn't perfect: the puzzles are quite annoying and the weapon switching feels clunky at times. But between the beautiful graphi

Great, touching story. Escort quest done right. Graphics are amazing, so is the sound design. A great start for this franchise.
very unique and good game. journey was fun and emotional, i really liked it, now time to rush for its requiem.

Really enjoyable game with a few game breaking bugs on higher frame rates. Highly recommended.

A Beautiful Journey (With an Annoying Little Brother) I love this game. The graphics and ambiance are so nice, the characters are well-written, and the story of a sister and her brother is amazing. Throughout the whole

A shorter, medieval French take on The Last of Us — but with rats. At first, it felt a bit like a budget version of TLOU, but the game quickly finds its own identity and grows into something unique. The second half is noticeably stronger in almost every way — better level design, stronger acting, and more engaging puzzles. My only real complaint is that the latter half forces you into direct comba

Those damn rats ! Very good story and characters, decent progression system and fighting mechanics, some wonky AI but overall ok, very cool puzzle system and cool puzzles. Graphics are good too. Overall 8,5/10 !!

Good story, decent enough puzzles but the camera angle's are frusterating where when you move around looking for stuff it can snap back to a pre-set completing disorienting you. It becomes noticable by the end of the game where it starts to have more gameplay. Hopefully they improved that in the second one.

Fantastic game. Loved my time with it. The characters are compelling, and the stakes do a good job to heighten the strong narrative. It was also surprisingly longer than I expected to beat, which I didn't mind. Never felt like it overstayed it's welcome. I can't complain much given the budget and the size of the team responsible, they managed to deliver a great experience. Well done to the devs, a

This has aged pretty well. I just (2026) beat it after starting it on the PS5 and never completing it and am glad I gave it a second shot. It has engaging characters and story and a great fourteenth-century French medieval setting which still looks very pretty on ultra settings at 1440p. Amicia and her little brother Hugo are both likeable figures and you want her to succeed in protecting and then

A Plague Tale: Innocence was a really enjoyable surprise for me. The atmosphere completely carries the game. The dark medieval setting mixed with the massive rat swarms makes everything feel tense and horrible in a way that really stands out. The characters honestly aren’t anything amazing writing-wise, but the dialogue between everyone feels really natural, which made the story easy to stay inves

A really good game , with a terrible English voice acting, and subpar animations and facial expressions 8 / 10

A Plague Tale: Innocence is an amazing game that really delivers a strong and memorable experience. It offers interesting gameplay with puzzles that sometimes actually make you stop and think, instead of just rushing through everything. That alone makes it feel more engaging and rewarding. The story is beautifully written, very well thought out, and genuinely emotional. It keeps you invested from
I'm a big stealth/rogue like fan, so this was very fun and the story is well written, and I can see myself playing this again!
great characters and story telling with stealth game mechanics and a littlle horror elements thrown in to mkae things tense and meaningful.
Very atmospheric and medieval experience. The graphics are gorgeous and the story carries you all sort of settings masterly crafted. One of a kind!
This game was quite the journey It's clunky sometimes but in general it's a good game

Good narrative with excellent graphics for a AA. This is more like a puzzle game than stealth combat. You might run into a couple of bugs but there's frequent checkpoints. 8.5 rats out of 10 rats would rat again

Play the demo. YouTube footage doesn't do this justice. This game caught me by total surprise - it was like an environmental tech demo with solid character and story development that had me hooked. I'm shocked how good it looks and performs while giving attention to so many small details. Some segments feel a bit slow after the strong first half of the game, but overall you're more than invested i

One of the best story games I’ve ever played. When I bought it, I wasn’t planning to get the second part, but after finishing it, I had to continue the story because it was that good. For The Last of Us fans, including me, this is the game for us.
It is a masterpiece. It is immersive and satisfying to play. One thing to note is that it is short. Despite this, the game is insanely good and the story is peak. I would like to try Requiem.
TW: Dog death. Other than that this game made me cry. I absolutely loved the story and the development of the sibling relationship throughout the hardship. UGH can't wait to play the next one

Don't know why I'm just now leaving a review when I first played the game many years ago. The game is gorgeous, its soundtrack is masterful, and its story is beautiful. If you enjoyed The Last of Us, I guarantee you will enjoy this game. I still haven't gotten around to playing the second one. I think I'll do that now.

▷평점 : ★ A Plague Tale : Innocence 2019년 6월 4일에 출시한, 1인칭 시네마틱 어드벤처 게임. 다른 의미로 공포 게임이며, 잠입 탈출에 가까운 게임이다. 먼저 이 게임을 하기 전에 역사를 알 필요가 있다. 이 게임은 14세기 프랑스와 잉글랜드 간에 전쟁이 발발했던 '백년 전쟁'을 배경으로 만들어졌다. '프랑스 왕위 계승 분쟁'이라고 말할 수 있는 이 전쟁은, 무려 116년간 전쟁을 했던 역사적 사건이다. 여기서 잉글랜드와 영국을 헛갈리는 사람들이 있을 텐데, 영국은 '잉글랜드', '스코틀랜드', '웨일스', '북아일랜드' 이렇게 4개의 지역의 연합 국가이며, 당시 잉글랜드는 영국과는 상관없는 별개의 왕권 중 하나였다. 각설하고, 당시 프랑스를 통치하던 '카페 직계'의 마지막 왕
Excellent game. For a long time I really enjoyed the plot and the characters' company. The voice acting is incredible. I've probably found a rival to The Last of Us.
Really impressive. The bond between Amicia and Hugo is great and the rat mechanics are creative and cool. A great narrative experience.

It felt like watching a movie - everything was great. I love collectibles, and this game has them in the form of flowers and souvenirs. The storyline is captivating. The optimization is top-notch, too

진짜 잘만든 게임. 자녀에게도 추천할 수 있다. 중세시대를 매우 잘 고증 재연하고 스토리도 개성있고 유니크함. 매우 재밌음 2번 플레이 중., 난이도도 쉬운편.

스토리와 그래픽 조작감 뭐 하나 불편한게 없었습니다. 에임이 좋지 않은 사람들을 위해서 조준또한 보조해주고 길도 찾기 어렵지 않지만 못 찾을시에는 알려주기까지 하는 친천한 게임 인거 같습니다. 플레이 타임또한 괜찮은거 같고 가장 재미있었던거는 스토리와 그래픽 이였던거 같습니다. 스토리가 정말 재미있었고 그래픽이 그 재미를 배로 늘려준거 같습니다. 원가에 사도 괜찮은 게임 같습니다. 이 글이 도움이 되었으면 합니다.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is one of the most atmospheric and emotional games I've played. The story of Amicia and Hugo grabs you from the first minutes and doesn't let go until the end. An unforgettable experience. The plot is masterfully presented, the characters are lively and believable, and the bond between Amicia and Hugo is the true heart of the game. The game has a very interesting story, while still having good graphics and low system requirements. It’s also very easy to get all the achievements, andstill fun even after playing it for the third time. Strongly recommended!

From the very first minutes A Plague Tale: Innocence captivates with its atmosphere. The dark world of medieval France combined with excellent presentation and the story of Amicia de Rune protecting her younger brother in a brutal world filled with death and chaos, makes the game immediately engaging. A Plague Tale is an emotional and beautifully crafted experience with an amazing atmosphere and storytelling. The bond between the characters feels genuine, and the dark medieval world keeps you immersed from start to finish. A truly memorable game with stunning visuals and a fantastic soundtrack.

Es una de esas historias que te logran enganchar desde el inicio por la manera en que mezclan emocion,tension,supervivencia y visualmente es impresionante. I really enjoyed the character development of Amicia and Hugo and their relationship as siblings they grew closer throughout the game. The fighting was fun in the game and I enjoyed the story.

Fantastic game.highly recommended. Certainly linear, but the atmosphere and settings are brilliant. If you love all things Medieval, you can't go wrong with this masterpiece. Can't wait to play Requiem.

A Plague Tale has a story that’s way more detailed than the escape-to-safety romp I was expecting, involving bloodlines and ancient power, and one extremely evil leader of the Inquisition doing an extremely evil voice.

A Plague Tale: Innocence makes a commendable effort to mask its somewhat routine gameplay, and in the end, it wins you over with captivating atmosphere, great music, likeable main characters and nice visuals. If you like cinematic games, this stroll through Dark Ages is worth it.
Visually beautiful and emotionally affecting thanks to strong characters, A Plague Tale suffers from missing gameplay variety and tonal inconsistencies.
Although A Plague Tale: Innocence features spectacular artwork and excellent characters, they can't make up for the boring, predictable gameplay.

This is a third-person experience worth embarking on, if only for the distinctive way it subverts mechanics we’ve grown so familiar with. You can also feed evil soldiers to hordes of rats with the press of a button, which is morbidly delightful in its own messed up way.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a stunningly beautiful, and finely-crafted… ok. It's an ok stealth/action-adventure, with ok characters and drama, and oceans of rats that add an ok survival horror vibe to it. Certainly a fun title, but not exactly a big recommendation.
Equal parts beautiful, repulsive, simplistic, and mature, A Plague Tale: Innocence is difficult to recommend but impossible to dismiss.

[장점] 1. 베경을 이쁘고 밀도있게 그려냈다. [단점] 1. 적들이 억지로 나를 안봐준다. 내가 아무리 쉬운 게임을 좋아한다고는 하지만, 대놓고 지나가는데도 눈치를 못채는건 좀 아닌 것 같다. 2. HUD에 퀘스트가 보이지 않는다. 뭘 해야하는지 잠깐 보여주고 글자가 사라져서 기억 못하면 뭘 해야하는지 모르게 된다. 3. 전반적으로 엉성한 느낌을 지울수 없다.
did not care for the gameplay loop
It's unlikely Innocence will lead to an epidemic of similarly snappy games, but we'd love this particular contagion to catch on. [Issue#341, p.116]
We’ve got another outstanding adventure game. It’s not without technical flaws, but delivers a pleasant impression. Perhaps the next game of the studio will become a real gem.

As she gains new options, Amicia gradually transforms from a victim into a predator, which doesn’t exactly fit the atmosphere. On the other hand, it assures that you will enjoy the rollercoaster storyline without getting stuck at any particular puzzle. [Issue#238, p.58]

As easily as the plague swallowed Europe, A Plague Tale will swallow its players. Thanks to the great atmosphere and the main protagonists the game is an excellent story adventure that you shouldn´t miss out on. [Issue#295]
A Plague Tale: Innocence features excellent narrative and atmosphere, but the gameplay is a little bit dull.
A masterfully-narrated moving experience that could not be told in any other media. Imperfect due to railroaded gameplay, but otherwise it could've been a revolution instead of just a great game.
A perfect journey story. Deep characters, great graphics, impressive musics. A Plague Tale: Innocence one of the surprises of this year.

If you are looking for a whole new experience from what you already had in this generation, look no more, A Plague Tale: Innocence is what you want. A Plague Tale is not open world, does not offer multiplayer experience, and there is no big budget behind it. Instead it offers a linear stealth puzzle gameplay with a deep story and solid narrative, and that's exactly what we need every once in while

A Plague Tale: Innocence is all about surviving in an odious and decadent medieval Aquitaine, using your wits. The gorgeous art design and taut, realistic writing make for a heart-wrenching juxtaposition to its rat-infested underbelly and a journey that you'll not soon forget.

Overall, I enjoyed the time I spent with A Plague Tale: Innocence. It’s unique in premise and content, it looks and sounds good, and it doesn’t overstay its welcome. I probably would have liked it even better if it had stayed more stealthy than action-oriented, but I’m not going to complain. A Plague Take definitely isn’t for kids — violence and gruesome deaths abound, and there is also some (comp
A Plague Tale: Innocence would benefit from less busywork, but the grisly scenery and the sibling relationship at its core help make up for any shortcomings.

Despite the excellent start, A Plague Tale: Innocence doesn’t really blossom into a real masterpiece. The small bugs, some unintuitive commands and the fold taken by the narrative diminish some of the really positive features. The result, however, is still a good game.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a well crafted, classic adventure that offers a solid story with charismatic characters. However, it all goes wrong during the final chapters, when the game loses its head, the story becomes violent nonsense and the gameplay turns out to be highly frustrating.

At no point did I truly dislike Plague Tale. Quite the contrary. It almost never fails to give you something new to think about or look at, even if you tend to be doing the same three or four things while doing so. The art and environment design is on par with or exceeds some of 2019’s biggest budget titles, and while its core gameplay wears thin by the end, Plague Tale never seems to run out of u

With a magnificent storyline replete with devious puzzles and gorgeous vistas, A Plague Tale: Innocence is as beautiful as it is disturbing. A survival stealth title at its heart, Asobo Studio’s approach to the story of the bubonic plague is completely unique, and one I can’t recommend highly enough.
You must use all your guile and perseverance to traverse this nightmare, holding onto what you can, for as long as you can. I won’t be forgetting this game for a while.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a pleasant surprise during a season that usually has few significant releases. The story starts off in a fascinating way, and despite a few bumps along the way, the game maintains a player's curiosity throughout its runtime. The mechanics are great, especially since the title doesn't have many of the expected drawbacks, and it's all reinforced by an excellent all-around

The French duo Asobo Games and Focus Home Interactive confirmed all the good thoughts we have about A Plague Tale, with a truly fascinating and touching story that kept us on the edge of our seats from the beginning until the end. Despite a lifespan of about ten hours, the title remains very intense despite the absence of important moral choices and some summary game phases. A Plague Tale: Innocen

A Plague Tale: Innocence is definitely among the gaming surprises of 2019, exceeding expectations in the best possible ways. With its gripping tale, charming characters and solid gameplay mechanics, the game is a must-have for those who like single-player games with a strong focus on story and character development. Even if the tale does not take in you, A Plague Tale: Innocence still offers a com

One of my favorite moments is when Amicia spots another wildflower in a lone trek across the city, nestled among the decay of the rats’ revolting nests. Without her brother around, she picks it up, and places it gingerly in her own hair--a personal reminder to keep trudging on amidst the hardships, and a testament to her growing strength and tenacity. Despite flashes of predictability, moments lik

The scene of crossing a battlefield, with hundreds of lifeless bodies piled over each other, only to see a swarm of rats bursting out of a horse’s bloated corpse is just one of multiple sights that A Plague Tale: Innocence inevitably etches into your mind. Although its stealth and puzzle mechanics aren’t exactly fresh, having what’s, quite possibly, the most powerful representation of the Black De

A Plague Tale: Innocence brings a really good balance between narrative design and game design. The duo, well written, explores a rich universe during 14 to 15 hours of infiltration, puzzzles and tense sequences.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a jewel, a narrative and immersive adventure that captures your attention for hours. Artistically stunning, the game is also of great musical and auditory beauty and it is clear that the game is a true masterpiece.

A Plague Tale: Innocence doesn’t push the envelope as far as gameplay is concerned, but the incredibly compelling art direction and great writing should be experienced by any fans of single-player, narrative-driven experiences who don’t mind incredibly dark subject matter.
The journey of the two siblings is an intense experience that resonates for a long while.
One of the most engaging and original story-based games this year. It’s dragged down by some trite videogame elements but its characters elevate it above its contemporaries.

A Plague Tale: Innocence is a superb stealth adventure with excellent gameplay, gorgeous presentation, and a fantastic story that shows how the worst of what the world can throw at humanity can bring out the worst of it.
pipeline_summary:
A Plague Tale: Innocence는 흡입력 있는 스토리와 적절한 진행 장벽로 플레이어에게 깊은 몰입감을 주는 게임입니다.
장점: 게임의 진행 장벽은 적당하여 스트레스를 받을 일이 적습니다.
단점: 한 리뷰는 게임의 쥐가 너무 많고 극혐이라며 불만을 표현합니다. / 게임의 조작이 불친절하다는 의견도 있습니다. / 한 리뷰는 게임의 콘텐츠가 다소 부족하다고 느낄 수 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 중세 프랑스를 배경으로 한 아름다운 그래픽과 감동적인 스토리가 인상적인 게임

장점: 
- 진중한 분위기와 감동적인 스토리텔링
- 아름다운 그래픽과 사운드 디자인
- 플레이어의 감정을 자극하는 캐릭터 개발

단점: 
- 다소 짧은 플레이 타임
- 일부 플레이어에게 버그 문제가 발생할 수 있음
- 게임 플레이가 다소 제한적이며 쉬울 수 있음

title: Balatro
sample_texts: A nice little game to play in short bursts: you build your deck and try to make it to the end of the run, constantly facing new hurdles to overcome along the way. A bit of luck is involved, of course you can't win every game. Otherwise, the concept is excellent and offers plenty of variety; you’ll quickly find yourself wanting to play several rounds in a row. The animations are also great, definit

구매를 망설이다가 구글 제미나이의 영업으로 늦게 구매했습니다. 이 분야의 최고점은 아직 슬더스라고 생각하고 있기 때문에 슬더스가 많이 언급 될 예정이니 이해 부탁드립니다. 구매 전에는 게임 시스템을 이해하지 못 하고, 슬더스 만큼의 전략성이 없는 거 아냐? 덱이 다양해봤자 얼마나 다양하겠어? 플레이어의 선택이 중요해? 억까 당하면 죽는거 아냐? 등의 생각들이 있었습니다. 구매 후의 인상은 이 게임은 단순히 카드를 잘 내는 게임이 아닙니다. 이 게임의 핵심은 조커라는 생각이 들었습니다. 조커는 게임 중 강력한 효과를 주는 슬더스의 유물과 유사한 포지션인데요. 다른 점이라면, 조커 카드는 슬롯 제한이 있다는 점입니다. 슬더스는 덱을 만드는 게임이라면, 발라트로는 조커를 만드는 게임이라고 할 정도로 이 조커 카드
발라트로 만든사람 미친새끼고 이 게임도 미친게임임 어케 만들었노 ㅋㅋ

노트북에서 즐기기 가장 좋은 게임(이렇게 사양이 구려도) 초반에는 점수 모으기 힘들지만 나중에는 점수 뽕이 진짜 큽니다 그러나 운 안 좋으면 파밍한 1시간이 순식간에 날아갑니다. 시간 없으신 분들은 모바일이나 스위치 판으로 짬짬히 즐기면 좋을 듯 싶습니다.(내가 처음으로 모바일판 사고 pc판으로 넘어온 게임입니다.) 럭키 카드 같은 확률 카드나 그로미셸(바나나) 같은거 넣으면 도파민으로 절여집니다. 슬레이 더 스파이어랑 비슷한 게임인데 다른 점이라면 이 게임에는 캐릭터가 없습니다(대신 덱(카드 묶음)이 존재)*즉 캐릭터 별로 다르게 풀레이하는 그런 재미 보다는 그냥 규칙이 달라진다고 보시면 됩니다(대표적인게 소개 영상에 나오는 플라즈마 덱입니다.) 타임머신 게임입니다(아 정신적으로 시간을 바꿔줍니다)*잠이

조커 카드로 추가 점수를 얻고, 내 카드의 확률을 조작해서 큰 점수를 얻는 포커 게임 빌딩하는 재미가 있고, 이를 기반으로 내 점수가 잘 뻥튀기가 되는지 보는 재미가 쏠쏠함. 포커라는 게임을 정말 재미있고 중독성 있게 변형해서 잘 만듦. 도박 요소로 어떻게 압박감을 주고 도파민을 분비하는지는, 일정 턴 내에 못 끝내면 "그럼 죽어"라는 형식이라 덕분에 항상 긴장감을 가지게 됨. 진짜 아쉬운건, 아직도 이 게임의 용어를 잘 모르겠음. 고유 명사가 남발함. 도움말 기능도 있는게 아닌데, 용어가 헷갈려서 트롤짓 하는 경우도 간간히 있어서 조금 불편했음. 이것만 고치면 정말 완벽한 게임. 유튜브나 방송으로 봐도, 꼭 직접 사서 해보길 권장함.

이 게임을 선물해준 친구에게 감사. 포커를 베이스로 둔 로그라이크 카드 게임. 카드 효과와 비주얼이 꽤 인상적이었던 걸로 기억한다. 시스템 자체도 상당히 참신했고, 포커라는 익숙한 룰을 이런 방식으로 풀어낸 점은 확실히 매력적이었음. 다만 개인적으로는 취향에 맞지 않아 오래 플레이하진 못했음. 자신만의 빌드와 족보를 조합해 높은 점수를 뽑아내는 것이 이 게임의 핵심 재미겠지만, 나는 다소 킬링타임 게임처럼 느껴졌고 오래 붙잡게 만드는 깊은 몰입감은 부족하게 느껴졌음. 그래도 이 게임이 2024년 GOTY 후보에 올랐다는 걸 보면 왜 많은 사람들이 열광했는지는 충분히 이해가 간다.

A successful roguelike asks the player to balance strategy, risk and reward, and a bit of luck. It feels early to induct Balatro into the genre’s hall of fame, alongside the likes of Spire, Hades, Into the Breach, and Spelunky. (I would also add the very underrated Slice & Dice to that pantheon.) The gauge tends to be how long people play it and what depth that sustained repetition reveals over ti

Ultimately, Balatro is a game that delights in the art of making numbers go up - big, fast and on fire - by whatever means necessary. It reels you back in not to exploit psychological weakness, but to celebrate the inherent joy of learning, mastering and beating a system gamed around impossible odds, all while being just a teeny bit naughty in the process. The result is a surprisingly layered and extremely addictive game, with pixelated retro graphics. Cleverly designed too, as all the bleeps and effects constantly provide little shots of dopamine, much like a jackpot, slot machine or coin toss from the luna park. The addition of jokers and bonus cards made available seemingly at random make each game different, and replayability almost endless.

Balatro is excellent all around. The concept is simple, and while the various card types seem overly complicated, the game remains easy to understand no matter how many rules there are. It's utterly enjoyable to the point where you'll keep coming back no matter how many times you lose to a boss with a ridiculous modifier. For anyone who likes card games, Balatro is a must-have.

A unique and damn addictive card-based roguelite that borrows basic rules from poker, only to effortlessly turn them on their head using jokers, tarot cards, and celestial bodies. Countless possibilities, synergies, and combinations ensure hours of fun that you won't want to tear yourself away from.

Balatro is seemingly simple, seemingly trivial, yet it’s impossible to tear yourself away from it. Each attempt goes a little differently, your strategy needs to evolve constantly and even after a couple of hours you’re still being surprised by new modifiers, ideas and the need to change your approach. It’s a great game that simply doesn’t get boring.
A smart and engaging re-implementation of the classic poker game, including hundreds of different cards and special effects.

Balatro is an astonishingly addictive take on Poker that's utterly impossible to put down. Occasional difficulty spikes aside, it's a piece of simplistic genius that we'll keep on our Steam Deck forever.
A fabulous gateway for new players and something fresh for those of us already obsessed with digital cardboard rectangles, Balatro is an explosion of glee but it burns out fast.

Despite that, Balatro is an incredibly easy-to-learn deck builder with plenty of room for experimentation. Even after hundreds of runs, you’ll still encounter new options and combinations to twist your brain around. Even if roguelites and deck builders aren’t normally your favorite genres, Balatro is a game you need to check out.

Balatro ticks all the boxes for a roguelite that creates a feedback loop that's difficult to draw yourself away from. Its fundamentals are incredibly easy to understand, even if you're unfamiliar with poker, but the ways in which it works within the game's boundaries (and often breaks free from them) injects a level of depth to each hand to play that's both challenging and rewarding to continually

Balatro ingeniously transforms the familiar concept of poker into a fresh and captivating experience, offering a plethora of strategies to explore through its innovative mechanics. Despite its minor flaws, such as occasional unfair boss encounters, the game's depth, accessibility, and addictiveness make it a standout title in the roguelike card game genre.

This is one of those games whose simple concept lends itself to almost limitless depth. Even after dozens of hours of play, this roguelite deckbuilder manages to surprise you with strategies you never knew were possible.

I never would have expected that a roguelike could work so well in a card game before I played Balatro. It’s simple and guides you in so well, but escalates quickly and is happy to crush your run at any moment with the smallest strokes of misfortune. That’s what makes the variety of jokers and bonus cards so fun to explore. Every new option provides an opportunity to buck the house advantage. It l

Go play one of the most addicting Roguelite games in the last couple of years, and don't you dare say that the gaming industry lacks creativity and fun ideas. Much like in the beginning of 2023, the indie scene is outdoing itself.

Balatro is addictive. I’m not much of a poker or deck builder player, but I find the combination of the two irresistible. If you have an interest in either, then this game is sure to entice you. Especially since the game is out on every platform and is available now.

Balatro is a fantastic rogue-like deck-builder. Additionally, the random nature of each round keeps you on your toes. However, it is pretty unforgiving and the repetitive nature of the core concept may put some gamers off.

Despite all of the playable cards being the standard 52-card pack, the extra systems surrounding it create a gameplay loop just as – if not more – complex, addictive, and downright joyous as Slay the Spire, and I don’t say that lightly.

Balatro is as good as Slay the Spire was. It's a roguelike deckbuilder, but beginning from a poker deck. The concept is both original and fun. Its modifier cards offer almost unlimited possibilities, making each run unique in its own way. Balatro gives you hours and hours of entertaining and we can just wait for new content in the future. One of the best games of the year so far.

Balatro is easily one of the freshest roguelites to come out in some time. By loosely applying the rules of poker to a deckbuilding format, developer LocalThunk has managed to forge something special.

Balatro is an ingenious and entertaining roguelike and one of my favorite games of the year. Playing it has become a near-obsession; everything feels perfectly designed to encourage you to keep trying because that next run could be the run of your life. Even after hours of play, I still can’t overcome Balatro’s biggest challenge: putting it down.
pipeline_summary:
밸라트로(Balatro)는 포커 로그라이크 게임으로, 조커 카드와 덱 빌딩을 통해 점수를 얻는 게임입니다.
장점: 조커 카드와 덱 빌딩을 통해 점수를 얻는 게임으로, 중독성이 강합니다. / 다양한 조커 능력들이 게임을 더욱 흥미롭게 만들어줍니다. / 진행 장벽은 중간 정도로, 운빨 요소도 있지만 잘 짜면 할만합니다.
단점: 창작마당 미지원으로 인해 사용자 제작 콘텐츠를 이용할 수 없습니다. / 한글화 부족으로 인해 게임을 이해하기 진입 장벽이 있습니다. / 콘텐츠 양이 적다고 느낄 수 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 로그라이크와 포커를 결합한 게임으로, 다양한 조합의 조커 카드를 통해 전략을 짜고 높은 점수를 얻는 게임

장점: 
- 로그라이크와 덱 빌딩 장르의 재미
- 다양한 조합의 조커 카드
- 높은 점수를 얻기 위한 전략 짜기
- 간단하지만 깊이 있는 게임 플레이

단점: 
- 운이 작용하는 요소가 크다는 점
- 금방 질릴 수 있는 중독성
- 일부 플레이어에게 게임이 너무 쉬워질 수 있음

title: Death Stranding
sample_texts: 페북과 트위터가 세상을 점령해버린 시대. 여러분들은 아무리 고되고 ㅈ같은 일을 해도 받을수 있는건, 개 ㅈ도 도움안되는 따봉뿐 입니다. 축하드립니다.

데스 스트랜딩을 추천해줘도 어짜피 스팀에서 판매되지 않기 때문에 자유롭게 평을 남김. 배달하는 게임이고, 스토리영상은 매우 호쾌함 다른사람은 아닌가봐 ㅇㅇ 길마다 국도를 건설할 수 있는 구축토대가 있음 거기에 금속,세라믹,레진,금속합금+ 등등이 들어감 카이랄광물 포함 지으면 고속도로를 지어서 싱글플레이지만 다른유저들에게도 공유가 됨.물론 공유시스템을 켰다면 말이다. 탈것은 아직 밴차량 같은 적재차량과 바이크와 개량바이크 만 봤음 그리고 입고 싸울수 있는 스켈레톤(콜오브듀티에서 나온 슈트)을 장착하고 다닐수 있음. 기능 좋음 사전예약구매와 에디션 질렀는데 골드 스켈레톤포함된걸루다가 샀는데 좋았음 효과가.. 아직은 에피소드 4인데 아직 몇작을 못함. 하지만 고속도로는 다 이어놓음. 배송 퀘스트 도중에 비가 내립니다. 근처 타임폴 쉘터에 오토바이를 주차합니다. 잠시 패드를 내려 놓고, 아름다운 산악 지형을 감상하며 빗소리와 함께 음악을 듣습니다. 파괴된 세상의 역설적인 아름다움, 삶과 죽음을 치열하게 다루고 있는 세계관, 살아남은 인류를 연결하기 위해 자신의 몸을 바치는 주인공. 마치 재림 예수의 발자취를 따르는 듯 한 고난의 여정을 아름답고 감성적으로 담아냈습니다. 데스 스트렌딩2가 나온 이 시점에 1을 플레이 하고 있고, 이 아름다운 여정이 앞으로도 남아 있다는 사실이 매우 기쁩니다.

PS4로 한번 PS5로 두번 PC로 한번 총 4번의 엔딩, 4회차를 봤다. 버전별 출시 시기가 다르므로 각각의 회차를 연달아한건 아니다. DS2의 PC판 출시 기념으로 플레이를 했다. 역시 특유 감성은 1편을 따라가기 힘들었다는 감상이다. 2편은 상당히 광활한 세계를 보여지만 다소 긴장감이 떨어지며 지루하다는 느낌까지 받기도 하였다. 그와 동시에 넓은 맵에 대한 피로감까지. 하지만 DS1은 후속작 대비 밀도있는 플레이 경험을 선사한다. 누군가는 열악한 필드 판정을 지적할 수 있을 것 같다. 실제로 상당히 지랄 맞은 관계로 탈것을 버리고 다리로 이동하는 편이 심신에 이롭다. 탈것이 활용되는 순간은 국도에서뿐. 그러한 이유로 순수하게 두 다리로 걸어 고난을 해쳐나가는 경험은 1편의 맛이 더 좋았다. 직접적인 게

나는 콘솔게임을 정말 좋아하지만 내인생 한번도 플레이스테이션을 가진적이 없다.(PSP는 가지고 있었다.) 그래서 이게임은 해볼 생각도 안해봤지만 PC로 출시된다는 소식에 냉큼 질렀다. 처음에는 평가 자체가 호불호가 엄청 심하더라. 그저 배달만 하는 게임이라고 불호 하는 플레이어들이 꽤나 있었다. 나도 솔직히 선입견을 가지고 첫 플레이를 시작했던것 같다. 하지만 선입견은 정말 선입견이었다. 나는 대체로 정말 재미있게 즐겼고, 모든 게임을 꼼꼼하게 하는 성격탓에 모든 맵에 고속도로를 전부 깔고 난 뒤에나 엔딩을 봤다. 단순히 배달하는 게임이 뭐가 재밌냐고 반문 할 수 있다. 하지만 나는 거기에 다시 반문하고 싶다. 배달 자체가 재밌더라. 전투도 생각보다 나쁘지 않았다. 전투가 그렇게 많지는 않지만 가끔가다 게임
