It reminds us that we are all connected, but that real monsters also exist. It reminds us that friends and family are the most important things of all. It reminds us

This is the definitive version of Death Stranding. If you were interested in Death Stranding when it released on PS4 and have been waiting to see how the PC version turns out, then go ahead and pull the trigger. However, Death Stranding isn’t for everyone. If you’ve seen nothing of the game before, make sure you check out some gameplay before purchasing it; I’ve had a blast experiencing the story

The PC release is the optimal way to experience the game, however, and for players that had the patience to wait, you are in for a treat. Similarly, returning PS4 players looking to double-dip will be able to appreciate the level of technical wizardry Kojima Productions have performed with their PC release.

Players who may have passed on the PS4 release in anticipation of Death Stranding coming to PC will not be disappointed. The game ran great during my preview experience, and features keyboard and mouse support. In a world that seems increasingly chaotic and apocalyptic, Death Stranding can provide players with a world that is actually trying to repair itself.

I approached Death Stranding twice. I spent a couple of hours with the PS4 edition and was fascinated with it. I kinda wish I stopped at that and let the game remain a mystery to me rather than complete it later on PC and be disappointed. There are moments when Death Stranding eludes the traditional 1-10 rating system. There are moments when it sets new standards and becomes a truly special experi

Death Stranding is asking you to find variety in a daily rut, cooperation possibilities for a character who has fear of contact, scientific explanations in clear-cut mysticism. Today, you’re annoyed that the story doesn’t move forward, and you have to trek into the same ghost-infested area as before, but tomorrow you’ll gladly spend a few hours hauling resources for a new highway and feeling good

Can I recommend Death Stranding? Not really. I don’t think it can be directly labelled ‘good’. It’s a full price, full length, but all too frequently sluggish game. However, if you’re a Kojima fan, I don’t think you’ll want to miss out on this deranged roller coaster ride of an experience and that really elevates it for me.

Despite my qualms about the closing hours of Death Stranding, I truly enjoyed about 30 hours of it. There are plenty of moments where tone-setting music sets in and the vastness of the landscapes smothers you with solitude and despair. Collecting materials and contributing them to an online structure was engaging and even downright addictive. Moreover, the foundations of the plot intrigued me so m

While the wonders of hiking around the beautiful world never really wear off, there are a lot of issues with how the game portrays women, how on the nose it is with some of its messaging, and there’s an overriding feeling of there being simply too many messages for one game. That all being said, the music is incredible, and it’s undeniably fascinating, even if it is marred by its story-telling fai

Can I recommend Death Stranding? It depends on which camp you sit in. If you want to see one of the most esoteric video games ever created, that has so many strange elements but none of them cohesively come together to make a traditional “game”, then yes. Dive in and revel in the madness that’s unfolding. If you want a good video game. I’d approach with caution. For me personally, I loved it. I do

Death Stranding is unlike any other AAA title on the market. It doesn't hold your hand or provide clear-cut narrative answers—it's downright confusing, at times. You're either onboard for this wild ride or you're not. Death Stranding is the definition of a divisive title, one with a plodding story and cumbersome menu system, but if you’re looking for something that challenges your perception of bl
The coronavirus has made its themes more relevant than ever and while there are many odd decisions, in terms of plot and game design, the overall experience remains strangely engrossing.
Kinda mid. too many cutscenes. doesnt allow you to quit cutscene without alt+f4 the game or skip cutscene

있어 보이고 싶은 때깔만 좋은 워킹 시뮬레이션 스토리 똥망 공감도 안되고 몰입도 안되는 짜증나는 스토리 떡밥만 엄청 뿌리고 뭔가 있어보이고 싶은 느낌만 엄청낸 겉멋에 찌든 게임 아이슬란드 풍경을 몇시간씩 돌아다니는게 지루하지 않을 사람이 있을까? (풍경은 멋있음 오브젝트가 별로 없어서 이끼낀 지형 풍경 하나는 사양 대비 기깔 나게 뽑은듯) 정가 주고 산게 후회 되는 손에 꼽는 게임, 2시간 지나기전에 환불 했어야 하는데 나중엔 괜찮아 지겠지 나를 속이며 2시간 넘어서 까지 했던게 제일 후회 앞으로 코지마 게임은 믿고 거름
5 years later and it still crashes on startup
이런 예술성 있는 작품을 플레이 하기에는 내가 너무 성질이 급한 것 같다. 남들이 말하는 재미있는 구간이 어딘지도 모르겠고 거기 까지 가는 길이 너무 스트레스받아서 겜삭함.

시네마틱 씬이 너무 길다 컨트롤러가 비동기화 될 정도로!! 근데 문제는 이게 뒤로 갈 수록 더 심해진다고 하더라.. 휴가 기간이라 크킹3도 질리고 해서 구매해 두고 근 1년을 손 대지 않은 게 생각나서 오늘 좀 해 봤는데 솔직히 돈 아깝다 아, 그리고 하나 더!! 이거 왜 이렇게 끊기는 거냐?? 코지마 안마기가 프로듀싱했다고 해서 기대했더니 어째 영 아니다
게임 컷씬 보는거 좋아하고 메기솔2 부터 해서 코지마 게임에 익숙하다고 생각해서 사람들이 오버하는 거겠지 하며 게임을 했는데 와 이건 좀. 어느정도 게임에 몰입이 되고 나서 컷씬을 보면 나도 같이 빠져드는데 이건 초반부터 컷씬을 주구장창 때려버리니 너무 지루하다 다음에 시간이 넉넉할 때 다 하고나면 평가가 달라질지도 모르겠지만 지금은 비추다

They are exaggerating this game so much. This game is boring. You are jsut carying cargos and it has a little bit of story that is it. I expected something because it is a Kojima game, but my hopes didnt survive long. You did better with konami, you did better

Death Stranding on PC is the best way to experience this journey. Game is much more than a walking Sim, it mixes and matches a ton of brilliant new ideas and game mechanics. It is bursting with atmosphere, and the overall quality of the production and presentation is fantastic. Other than minor issues and some non-consistent storytelling, Death Stranding shows us that boundaries can be moved in th

Death Stranding is an absolute masterpiece. It’s a triumph of one man’s unrelenting, uncompromised vision of hope. So powerful was this vision that it gave a deeply cynical individual like me a reason to hope. It’s a technological achievement on so many levels. But perhaps most of all, its revolutionary story, outstanding characters, and singular theme of human connection is the lingering triumph
Death Stranding is, on PC just as much as on console, a unique, charming experience filled with strange poetry.

The score is stunning. There’s a beautiful use of theme, drawing familiar phrases in at just the right moment, and let’s not even get started on BB’s Theme. It’s brilliant. Similarly, the moments where the camera pans back and Low Roar plays Sam out of a stressful area take on a feeling of zen. In those moments, I felt connected to this game, and Sam’s journey. I didn’t need any of the UI or envir

Death Stranding on PC is the best version of a true masterpiece. The pace of the game is relaxed and the open world is immutable, so conquering it requires great effort and patience. This makes it boring for some players. But, for others, it will be tremendously rewarding because our steps, however small, have an impact on the game's world.

It is safe to say that Death Stranding achieves all its goals, in an impressive but not so perfect fashion. The PC port of the game offers everything that the PS4 version offered, and more. If you have enough juice in your gaming rig, the PC version of Death Stranding is the best way to experience it.

Death Stranding still stands as one of the absolute coolest and most unique games of this current generation, and maybe one of the most unique of all time. It is such a wild blend of third-person action, open-world exploration, inventory management, “fetch quests” and incredible cinematics. It stands out even among the other wild games that Hideo Kojima has created, which really says something abo

Death Stranding is a great first look into Sony’s willingness to be more platform-agnostic. It also proves that Kojima Productions doesn’t have to regulate themselves to specific needs or restrictions of a console. While the developer didn’t entirely loosen its grips on its vision of Death Stranding, with the lack of standard PC settings, adapting to an open platform still couldn’t have been easy.
An unconventional game from an unconventional creator who largely succeeds at what he is attempting.

The idea of running back and forth across a large area may not be appealing to everyone. However, after setting aside the weirdly, and wonderfully confusing story and a few tense BT encounters, I found my time with Death Stranding to often be a more relaxing, chill, experience that I would recommend you check out.
A genuinely original and gorgeous new title from Kojima that manages to overcome its indulgent sections and a plodding midsection with a thoughtful ending. Did we say it looks utterly gorgeous too?

Death Stranding is precisely the kind of game you would expect from a creative mind when all the reins are removed. Finally, Kojima made the game he wanted to make, without compromises. It's a beautifully crafted story, albeit weird at times. Players can best answer the question of whether this is art. All I can say is that despite the uneasiness it causes me, I'm weirdly drawn to it, always looki

I love shooters, I love RPGs. I love racers, narrative driven experiences, indie games and AAA smash hits. About the only games I don’t love, are Tetris clones. Death Stranding hits different for me. I love the game, I have had an incredible time with it. I enjoy the simple but addicting gameplay loop, the sprinkled moments of action, and overall I enjoy the long winding narrative that sometimes t
The PC-version of Death Stranding is an examplary port of a phenomenal adventure and an absolute enrichment of the PC gaming cosmos.
Death Stranding on the PC is the best way to play this game. It contains everything the PS4 version brought and it looks far better, as it should if your sporting a nice GPU.

The PC version of Death Stranding is clearly the superior version as it's better looking, but also offers more content, a new difficulty setting, and a few Easter eggs to Valve Software's franchises. On the other hand the game's initial drawbacks are still present, like that awful advertisement for an energy drink, or a messy UI.

Through action sequences and heavy weather hikes, the frame rate is consistently in the high 90 FPS to 110 FPS. This is a proper PC port that looks stunning and runs smooth. If you're in the mood for a different style of gaming experience, one that's often relaxing and sometimes incredibly tense, Death Stranding is worth playing.

Death Stranding seeks to subvert the concept that we have of an open world, giving more importance to exploration and discovery. A game with a story that hits the primary emotions of the player, addressing existentialist themes as few games have accomplished to do.

Death Stranding is an excellent game with a lot of content and a ton of unique angles. The story is straight-up dumb a lot of the time and things can get tedious and clunky, but the thrill of exploration and making your own way overcomes all obstacles. Just like. Ugh. Sam Porter Bridges.

Death Stranding is unlike anything else out there right now. It's huge, innovative and utterly unashamed in what it wants to be. Kojima Productions is heavy-handed in its implementation of modern political themes, but they tie into the narrative and involve the player in ways that feel compelling.
Kojima’s latest work lands on PC with a fantastic adaptation that pushes even further its incredible visuals and adds some minor content, becoming the best version currently available.

The word "masterpiece" is often used inappropriately and risks losing strength. But if you look at the entire production of Kojima, science fiction as a narrative genre, and those video games that try to get out of the production and thematic logics of the mainstream market, it is undeniable that the merits of a giant should be recognized at Death Stranding.

Death Stranding lands on PC in the best possible way. The game is a well optimized port that many players will be able to enjoy due to its accessibility requirements. Even if you already enjoyed the game on the PS4, this is a good opportunity to revisit it.

Death Stranding is only made better in the transition to PC. Its world feels more vibrant and alive thanks to 4K and 60fps gameplay. Beyond that it's mostly the same experience as you got on PS4, which was already quite impressive.
Hideo Kojima's PlayStation 4 title Death Stranding has landed on PC, bringing with it a new standard of console ports.

Death Stranding in its PC version represents the best experience in the imaginary world of Kojima Productions. In many aspects the differences with the PS4 version are minimal, this is due to the excellent work done in the beginning by the development team, but improvements such as an unblocked frame rate and a smoother interaction with the game menus, combined with few extra missions, make this t

A few months after its console release, the PC port of Death Stranding offers a little extra soul to a very special game. Thanks to consistent graphics parameters, a wide-screen mode or clever keyboard and mouse controls, the game surely rewards all the most patient players. However, those who already reached the West Coast on PS4 can easily skip the Half-Life bonuses, as they truly exist as anoth

It’s dull and vibrant, clever and convoluted, thrilling and idling, beautiful and grim. It swings between supremely satisfying and maddeningly frustrating, and though it’s trite to say it, it isn’t a game made for everyone.

Hideo Kojima has long been a visionary auteur; his feted career stands as proof. With no walls to contain him, he has given birth to Death Stranding. It's an experience that will be remembered for a long time, from its early hype to the untethered lunacy of its narrative. It's an art installation of a game that filled me with rage as often as it did joy. It is sweeping in both lustre and purpose,
Death Stranding is a game meant to be experienced by all, even those who won’t complete it, and a good PC build makes this the best version to determine if Sam is the right porter for the job.

Death Stranding takes on a whole new meaning in 2020, and it's a story well worth revisiting or experiencing for the first time on PC. The pacing of the game can certainly drag to a screeching halt through the middle, but with boosted frame rate and crisper visuals, you'll likely be too mesmerised by the hauntingly gorgeous world of Hideo Kojima's latest masterpiece to even care about the uneven s

With production values that are through the roof and an extremely engaging story, Death Stranding is among Hideo Kojima's best games. The moment-to-moment gameplay, however, falls short due to its repetitiveness, and the long stretches without any real action make it difficult to recommend the game to all open-world fans. Death Stranding is something different, and only approaching it with an open

The Death Stranding port from PS4 to PC is a complete success. Sony, Kojima Productions and 505 Games had the intelligence to use the latest generation of the PS4 in terms of graphics. In terms of content, Death Stranding PC offers six new side quests related to Half-Life and Portal; a welcome homage for Valve's fans. Beyond the graphic qualities detailed in this test, the latest Kojima remains a

The atmosphere created here; a plot that pulls the player in with compellingly designed and voiced characters; an addictive and highly polished gameplay loop; and a fantastically realised visual world. These are some of the reasons why Death Stranding is such a joy to play. In many ways, this is more than a game. Gameplay here is built to service the atmosphere rather than the other way around and
Death Stranding is a masterpiece of game design which surpasses your every expectation.

Death Stranding is a wholly unique and fresh experience that will surely appeal to only a few, and the surprisingly engaging experience of essentially being a delivery man in the post-apocalypse is hypnotizing. Kojima’s standout weird and wacky writing is left unhinged here, and that can excite some or terrify others, but the truth is that Death Stranding on PC is definitely the ultimate version o
As thrilling as it is boring, as fantastic as it is mundane, but one thing’s for sure - there’s truly nothing else like it.

Death Stranding doesn’t try to imitate other games, and it’s not for everyone. However, it’s one of my favorite journeys in video gaming history. I feel I’ll return to again and again as the years pass.

Death Stranding came out in 2019 for the PS4, but the PC port looks to become the definitive version of the game thanks to improvements that make it playable across any type of machine. It's also, oddly enough, more relevant than ever.
Death Stranding is a must have on PC as it was on PS4, now unlocking bold new features such as 60+ fps even on less performing machines.

Death Stranding is one of those special games that comes out from time to time. Hideo Kojima shows that he's a great storyteller, but he also knows how to create a solid and attractive gameplay. It may not appeal to everyone, but it's certainly one of those games that have to play once in your life.
Death Stranding arrives on PC with better performance and much more content. Like 9 months ago, the game is still doing great work as an incredible journey and a funny delivery simulator.
Kojima's prestigious project boasts a great technological framework, but still suffers from a lack of action and it’s one dimensional story.

Death Stranding remains a fascinating experience of highly inspired post-apocalyptic science fiction even on PC. However, the porting is a bit lacking in terms of technical improvements, which are noticeable but not nearly as impressive as we hoped for.
Slow, weird, and indulgent, but a true original, and a journey that will linger in your mind long after it's over.
pipeline_summary:
플레이 흐름을 익힌 뒤 클리어까지 이어졌다는 반응이 있습니다.
장점: 파괴된 세상의 역설적인 아름다움과 삶과 후반부 핵심 요소을 다루는 세계관이 호평을 받았습니다. / 진행 장벽과 도전과제에 대해 구체적인 호평을 했습니다. / 플레이 흐름을 익힌 뒤 클리어까지 이어졌다는 반응이 있습니다.
단점: 후반부 길이가 너무 길다는 비판을 받았습니다. / 후속작 PC 출시를 오래 기다려야 한다는 불만이 있습니다. / 후반부 진행이 불합리하게 느껴져 중단했다는 반응이 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 코지마 히데오의 야심작으로, 독특한 세계관과 감성적인 스토리, 아름다운 그래픽으로 호불호가 갈리는 게임

장점: 
- 몰입감 있는 스토리와 세계관
- 아름다운 그래픽과 사운드
- 독특한 게임플레이와 메커니즘
- 감성적인 경험과 여운

단점: 
- 지루하고 반복적인 게임플레이
- 긴 컷신과 연출
- 난해한 스토리와 이해하기 어려운 요소들

title: Dragon Age: The Veilguard
sample_texts: While it's not like the previous entries of the series, I personally don't understand the hate. I've enjoyed this and it's definitely worth picking up on sale.

i played through veilguard twice on console and am now picking it up on steam after almost two years. i've been a huge dragon age fan since origins, i waited 10 years for veilguard and i just have to say i really enjoyed the conclusion to the series! of course theres pros and cons to the gameplay loop, writing and characters, but overall, for me, this is the perfect ending for such a long winded s
Absolutely charming characters, good heart and amazing gameplay

went into this kinda hyped but it’s just alright. combat’s more action now, feels smooth but not super deep. story’s decent but didn’t really pull me in like older dragon age games. characters are hit or miss. it looks good and all but something about it just doesn’t stick. not bad, just not as good as i expected.

Great game with amazing gameplay, a compelling story and fun companions. I don't know how it holds up to the rest of the series since I only played inquisition and Veilguard, but I'm loving it. I especially love the new inclusion of trans and nonbinary experience and dialogues specific to these. I also really like that your identity and background overall (specie and faction) have an impact in the
출시 시기 pc 논란으로 내키지 않다가 세일하길래 구매해 해봤는데 재미있네요. 동료캐릭터들 외모야 미형이 전혀 없어 호불호 갈리겠지만 주인공 커마는 공 좀 들이면 제법 괜찮게 뽑을 수 있고 전투 타격감이 아주 좋습니다. 너무 비인기 게임이라 공략이나 진행 팁 자료가 부족해 그건 아쉽네요.

Yes, I'd recommend Dragon Age: The Veilguard. Just hit 10 hours and I'm really enjoying it. The world looks stunning, combat feels smooth and flashy, and the story has me hooked already. The companions are fun and the vibe is very Dragon Age. It's not perfect — the opening can feel a bit slow and there's some jank here and there — but overall it's a solid return to form. If you like BioWare storyt

형성된 여론만큼 엉망인 게임은 아닌거 같습니다. 기본기에 충실한 게임인데 특출나게 강점이 있는건 잘 모르겠습니다. 그나마 드래곤에이지 전작들 캐릭이 나온다는데 강점인거 같습니다. 추천, 비추천, 중용이 있다면 중용을 누루고 싶은데 그래도 Bad는 아니라 추천 누릅니다. 다 무난하게 좋은데 프로스트 바이트 엔진 특유의 느낌과 움직일때 다소 무게감이 떨어지는게 약간 아쉽습니다.

I would recommend this game if you are in the mood for a fantasy RPG with some eye catching graphics and wanting to design a really cool looking character. I am a die hard DA fan and have played all of the games but held off on this one for about a year and a bit. I was skeptical espesially after seeing some woke nonsense on the socials. Buuuuut I buckled after being bored at work and installing t

This game didnt disappoint. I tried to go in as objective as possible, seeing as Mass Effect/Dragon Age fans are severely unfair in their critiques. It has everything that Inquisition had and more. It does have more linear design, and more hand-holding, but it also has a good offshoot story.

Great lore (the Elves & Elven gods), voice acting, visuals and the characters. Combat is super fun and action-like. 4 classes each with 3 specializations, and most are good. Choices matter and the results are noticeable. Often what you say or do is brought up later on in dialogue and I like that a lot. There are a ton of cutscenes and if you like how your character looks, its' really nice
사람마다 다를수 있겠지만, 저한테는 정말 재미있습니다.
The hate is undeserved. This is a really great game. I hope more people figure that out and give it a try.
플레이하는 재미는 엄청나긴 한데.좀 앙상하긴 하다. 묘하게 파판16이랑 진행방식이 비슷한거 같기도 한데. 16이 전체 시리즈 안에서 어떤 평가를 받는지를 생각하면, 기존팬들이 반발하는 것도 충분히 이해가는 상황. 사실 전작을 아주 조금만 해본 상황에서는 그냥 저냥 재밌는 게임이라 생각되지만.
초반 스토리도 나쁘지 않고, 전투도 재미있는데. 왜 이리 인기가 없지? -- 이게임도 눈이 좀 피로하네.
'Veilguard' is easy to pick up, even for someone previously unfamiliar with the series, is full of endearing characters, has an intriguing plot, and has very satisfying combat mechanics.
Not really difference with inquisitor but story and new looks
타쉬는 앰릭을 이름이 아닌 시체남, 데스메이지라고 부르며, '살아있는 시체는 끔찍하다', '냄새가 이상하다' 등 상대방이 듣고싶어하는 말이 아닌 본인이 하고싶은 말을 한다. 그러나 정작 본인은 '그녀'가 아닌 '그들'로 불리기를 바란다. 바이오웨어의 현재를 관통하는 캐릭터이다.

드디어 대망의 엔딩을 보았습니다 !! ^___^ 모~~든 퀘스트 다하고 올 클리어 하고 왔습니다! 기록상 62 시간 써있네용!! 그럼 그 누구 보다 정확한 평가를 해보도록 하겠습니다 ! -- 우선 많은 분들이 말했던 *외모* 에 대한 부분은 그냥 평범합니다. 여러분 world of warcraft 아시죠? wow(와우) 그냥 이거랑 외모가 비슷해요 . 그리고 다양한 종족이 나옵니다. 편파적이지 않아요. 근데 여러분이 꼭 *주의* 하실 점 을 당부 드리자면 ,. 본 캐릭터는 ''반드시" 공을 들여서 엄청 예쁘게 만드세요! Customizing 이 꽤 잘되어 있어요. 컷 씬 마다 본캐릭터가 자주 나와서 표정연기를 합니다 , 반드시 예쁘게 만드셔야 몰입하는데 즐거우실 거에요 ^___^ 대충 만드시면 게임하는 내내

팬들이 스토리를 하도 욕하길래 걱정했는데 생각보다 재밌게 플레이했음 근데 확실히 전작들에 비해 굉장히 가벼워진 스토리이긴 해서 전작의 다크하고 딥한 스토리. 이런 걸 기대하면 실망할 것 같긴 함 동료들 개인 스토리도 그렇고 그냥 전체적으로 되게 가벼워짐 정말로 ㅠ 전작은 설정 엄청 촘촘했는데 여기서는 설정 구멍이 보임. 가장 치명적인 건 역시 전작 연동을 싹 없애버린 거 이게 진짜 ㅁㅊㅅㄲ들 같음 그리고 자잘한 버그들도 좀 있었음 물론 나는 해피엔딩무새이고, 그리고 전작들 코덱스를 잘 핥아먹지 않았기 때문에 생각보다 잘 즐겼다 그리고 후반에는 좀 드에 시리즈 느낌이 남 뽕도 차고 웅장하고 나한테 개막중한 선택을 강요하고. 또 나는 수집 요소도 좋아해서 좋았고 전투 난이도도 엄청 쉬워졌고 도전과제도 그리 어렵

오히려 전작을 안했다면 재미있게 했을 것 같다. 파티원 둘을 데리고 다니면서 적절한 보조로, 주인공이 메인으로 전투를 이끌어 갈 수 있는 것이 강점. 맵은 비교적 일직선이지만 자잘한 퍼즐이 있다. 자주 등대로 돌아가 동료퀘를 할 것! 메인 스토리 진행되면 더 이상 진행될 수 없는 것들이 있다!

게임은 진짜 재밌긴함 게임성 중요시하면 무조건 하세요 재밌긴해요 게임자체가 정교하게 잘 짜여져있음.근데 왜 게임을 해야되는지 스토리적으로 공감과 동기부여를 못해줌. 1. 스토리가 복잡하고 이해가 안되고 (참고로 드래곤에이지전시리즈 다함) 2. 갈등이 모두 사라지고 (엘프가 소수민족같은 느낌인데 뭔 논바이너리가 갑툭튀해서 짜증나게) 3. 1,2의 문제로 선택지 선택을 재미있게 해야할 이유가 없어짐 그냥 대충 스킵하고 겜만하게됨 내가 10대 20대때면 끝까지 했을 게임인데 나는 늙고 지친 30대라서 결국 하다가 말았음. 저는 중립인데 너무 저평가되어있어서 추천으로 박음.
상당히 공들여 잘 만든 게임 복합적이라.평가가 너무 박하네.

- 장점 최적화가 잘 되어 있다. 그래픽이 준수하여 눈이 즐겁다. 쉬운 조작감 한번에 쓸어버리는 기술이 있어 액션 쾌감이 있다. 맵 순간이동 기능이 잘되어 있어서 편리하다. - 단점 법사 기준 특정 빌드가 너무 쌔서 한쪽 테크만 타게 됐다. 다른 테크 여러 개 해봤는데 작성자 능지 이슈 때문인지 특정 빌드만 너무 쌨다. 스킬 구성이 단조로와 전투 스타일이 거의 변화가 없다. 패시브 트리는 있지만 트리를 찍더라도 드라마틱하게 변화 하지 않는다. 전작들과는 다르게 동료들은 그냥 스킬싸개일 뿐이다. 전략적인 움직임이 필요 없어졌다. 스토리가 단조롭고 뻔한 영웅 서사라 흥미가 떨어진다. 동료들이 안 예쁘고 매력적인 서사도 없다. - 총평 드래곤에이지 1.2.3 모두 엔딩을 본 팬으로써 매우 매우 아쉬운 후속작이다.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is a true tour de force from a company that knew it had to give its all to stay relevant thirty years after its founding—and it has undoubtedly succeeded.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard fails to live up to its predecessors and ranks among the worst in its genre and the franchise. Despite its potential and success with gender diversity, its attempt to modernize feels poorly executed. Visually, it’s pleasant, but it requires adjusting settings for optimal performance. It’s playable but it is best suited for people who aren't particularly interested in the

Dragon Age: The Veilguard misses the essence of earlier Dragon Age games, turning the dark fantasy world into a childish fairytale with shallow dialogue and limited, impactless choices. The game is linear and fails to honor the rich lore, intriguing characters, and complex choices the franchise is known for. Although the combat is smooth and visually impressive, it lacks depth and doesn’t fit the

There is so much else that is impressive and charming about Veilguard. The absurdly elaborate and expensive finales that cap off companion questlines; lavish, unique areas rolled out for a visit or two then never again. How story moments of real threat and menace stopped me in my tracks, because it turned out that Bioware wasn’t disinterested in this stuff, just saving it for when it really counte

In this “fantasy California” no one dares to hurt someone’s feelings – not even a necromancer or a hired killer. It’s a shame that dialogues are this bad, because the rest of the developer team was actually working hard: combat is fun (if a bit too simple), and some levels are outright gorgeous. [Issue#266]

Regardless of the developers' goals, Veilguard feels like a game designed and assembled in parts. However good any idea, scene or concept is - and there are some excellent ones - it isn't bolstered by those beside it. Instead, each feels like a dazzling distraction from where it falls short in depth, consistency and trust in players to engage with a complex world. [Issue#405, p.102]

The party members are a delight to spend time with and woo. The combat is some of the most fun I’ve had in a while with an action RPG. It is just a shame everything else falls short. The exploration is far too uninteresting, the story is haphazardly put together, and the mission structure is too linear. There is a good enough RPG to enjoy in Dragon Age: The Veilguard for diehard fans like myself,
BioWare's worst dialog, trivial puzzles, annoying level design, and tedious combat. My diagnosis: complete apathy.
Dragon Age: The Veilguard is an exceptional-looking game with initially exciting combat, but it’s let down by uneven storytelling that makes it duller than it should be.

The Veilguard has some fun combat and exploration mechanics, but in no way do they redeem a sterilized, safe, inoffensive, fully "Netflix" and badly written version of a dark fantasy world that has little to do with the series' past.

All told, Veilguard is an enjoyable RPG with rich character customization and striking visuals, especially within the cyberpunk-inspired Minrathous. The freedom to shape Rook's backstory and outlook is a welcome touch, yet it is offset by the reduction in meaningful choices and the series signature moral complexity. While Veilguard might not capture the epic scope of Origins or the tightly woven,
Dragon Age: The Veilguard is a colorful but absolutely passable game that lacks any depth. It will not only disappoint the fans of the previous parts, but also will not give joy to the new ones.
When the long-awaited game comes out clichéd, we have no words to describe our disappointment. Unfortunately, Veilguard fell far short of our expectations.
There is lots to do in this huge and beautiful fantasy world, but inconsistent writing and muted combat dull its blade.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is full of heart and soul. It’s also got some great ideas. Conversely, many of those ideas feel like they struggle to get out of first gear - and those that do find it harder still to make it to third. Sometimes the cleverest ideas are undermined by other systems or decisions. Simultaneously feeling polished to within an inch of its life in places and utterly half-baked i

This isn’t the end of Dragon Age that I was expecting - in this respect, the game must be rated very low. However, as an action RPG with flair and a beautiful fairy-tale world, it turns out to be decent, and sometimes even more than that.
Dragon Age: The Veilguard excels on a number of counts; let's see if they're the ones you've been waiting for.

The latest chapter in the Dragon Age saga successfully combines the best of semi-open-world gameplay with a balanced and engaging combat system. While Dragon Age: The Veilguard falls short of previous installments in areas like side quests, story choices, and dialogue depth, it excels in combat quality, world design, and audiovisual presentation, delivering some of the most epic battles in the ser

Though it's ultimately held back its shortcomings, the other highs of Dragon Age: The Veilguard - its characters, its storytelling, and its sense of personality - make the game easy to like despite the flaws. The issues may be harder to look past for some, but others will find joy in the things it does do well.
Ultimately, Dragon Age: The Veilguard delivers on the promise of every Dragon Age with its strong characters, engaging combat, and a classic BioWare role-playing experience.

Overall, the core mechanics were engaging and the world was enchanting enough to keep me coming back night after night. Is this that amazing Dragon Age game we've been waiting years for? No, it's not. Is it a good game? Debatable. But it does so many right things at a few vital points that it managed to win my heart with those moments alone.

It’s goofy, and earnest, and consciously inclusive in a way that makes me, a queer person, scared to talk about it on the internet (even after all these years). It’s bold, and comfortable in itself, and even in its weaker moments, It does feel different to the past games, but for me, it’s a good kind of different.

While The Veilguard takes me back to the familiar world of Dragon Age, it also dares to experiment. Because that works out well (apart from some cringy writing), here is a satisfied fan. The heart of Dragon Age still beats, and with that mine too.

This game generally falls within the category of a decent ARPG. The combat feels satisfying, and the progression system provides a rewarding sense of growth. The main quest and especially the final chapters deliver plenty of excitement. the characters’ narratives lack intrigue, and there are aspects that may disappoint fans of the series.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is an action-filled game that is fluid, crisp, and exciting. The missions are well-written and enjoyable, and the dialogue between companions is delightful. There’s a lot to like about The Veilguard, but there are a few bumps in the road. For older Dragon Age fans, it might feel odd to be planted in this mostly dungeon-based mission corridor, but the experience never feel

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is a worthwhile return for the RPG franchise. Despite some oversimplification of mechanics and uneven writing, the new combat style and interesting characters and narrative choices make for an engaging fantasy adventure.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is undoubtedly a competent ARPG, with some commendable elements in its combat and exploration. However, it's disappointing that, aside from the impressive art design and nostalgic appearances of certain characters from previous entries, it feels like BioWare has strayed from the series' original essence. The familiarity is there, but it lacks the deeper connection that lo

Dragon Age The Veilguard is a massive new world full of thoughtful stories, epic battles, and beautiful visuals to accompany them. This round of companions is among the most interesting, thoughtful, and downright charismatic, and adventuring with them made for an unforgettable journey.

The writing can be overwrought, written by committee, and occasionally forced, but it’s also a major step forward for a team that needs the win. Dragon Age: The Veilguard brings us compelling characters, excellent combat, and a world worth saving.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard clearly wants to put epic action above all and sprinkles it with deeply emotional moments. Instead of choices and slow, tactical combat, the focus is clearly on a pre-composed story and powerful, action-packed battles. But if you engage with it, BioWare delivers one of the most thrilling role-playing games of recent years.

With Dragon Age: The Veilguard, I basically got exactly what I had hoped for from a sequel to Inquisition. An epic story about elven gods, the end of the world and the previously little-explored nations in the north of Thedas. Plus a wonderful cast of companions who all grew on me in their own way. All of this, embedded in the same attention to detail that made Inquisition one of my favorite games

With Dragon Age: The Veilguard, BioWare has largely returned to its roots, casting aside the temptations of open world and/or live service games. Instead, Veilguard is a great mission-based RPGs with a memorable story that will leave Dragon Age fans enthralled by the revelations, an awesome combat system that perfectly blends action and tactics, and lots of loot and secrets to uncover through its

The combat is wildly different and the tone varies, but the characters here are the same vital, meaningful core that BioWare is known to deliver. While far removed in many ways from the fantasy franchise I grew up loving, Dragon Age: The Veilguard takes its place by prior adventures in Thedas with pride. Like the Hero of Ferelden, Hawke, and the Inquisitor before them, Rook shows that Dragon Age i
Dragon Age: The Veilguard refreshes and reinvigorates this storied series with enjoyable action combat, a fantastic cast of companions, and moving character writing.

Dragon Age The Veilguard is the quintessential mass-market AAA, with all the qualities and shortcomings that implies. It's a great adventure with accessible, polished and well-thought-out content, even if the freedom isn't there. This is obviously a major flaw for an RPG, and one that is likely to anger many players. Ironically, in seeking to be open-ended at all costs, while avoiding taking risks

The game may stumble occasionally in its technical aspects, but its core—compelling storytelling, rich character relationships, and engaging combat—makes it an easy recommendation for not just BioWare fans, but any RPG fan.
A genuinely enjoyable, gorgeous action-RPG that lacks the storytelling nuance of previous Dragon Age games.
Superb visuals and art for a well crafted entry that focus on the action side, abandoning the RPG roots.

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is a return to form for BioWare. Assuming itself to be more of an action game, some RPG elements have been pushed into the background as a result. The history of the world of Thedas mixes with the history of Solas and our companions, in a plot that seems unappealing at first, but blossoms in the middle of the game. With breathtaking scenery and a very competent combat sys

Dragon Age: The Veilguard is a work that comes to the proverbial test after ten years. It is immediately clear how complex the project was and how the videogame world has changed over time. With a good combat system, a convincing narrative and a good development of the relationships with the other characters, on some points it does not fully succeed in reaching the objective. I admit that so many
pipeline_summary:
다양한 이용자들은 Dragon Age: The Veilguard의 콘텐츠와 전투에 대해 구체적인 호평을 남겼지만, 최적화와 그래픽에 대해 부정적인 의견을 제시했습니다.
장점: 쉬운 조작감과 한번에 쓸어버리는 기술로 인한 액션 쾌감이 있습니다. / 그래픽이 준수하여 눈이 즐겁습니다. / 최적화가 잘 되어 있어 플레이에 문제가 없습니다.
단점: 무기 방어구 외형이 재탕되고, 디자인 수준이 낮다는 비판도 있었습니다. / 성능이 떨어지는 현상이 발생하여 재시작하면 다시 괜찮아진다는 보고도 있었습니다. / 전투 감각이 취향에 맞지 않아 환불한 사례가 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 드래곤 에이지 시리즈의 팬들을 위해 만들어진 게임으로, 전작의 팬들에게는 다소 실망스러운 작품이지만, 새로운 액션 RPG로써는 충분히 즐길 만한 가치가 있다.

장점: 
- 화려한 그래픽과 타격감이 특징인 전투 시스템
- 다양한 캐릭터와 동료들의 관계
- 풍부한 세계관과 스토리텔링

단점: 
- 전작의 깊이 있는 스토리텔링과 복잡한 선택지가 부족
- 일부 팬들을 실망시킨 변경된 게임 플레이 스타일
- 캐릭터 디자인과 외모에 대한 비판

title: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
sample_texts: Everytime I was lost and confused where to go, I had to pull up Youtube The game was still alright tho but it was also unoptimized, playable but unoptimized.
This is a very good game plagued by an initial rocky launch. Runs great on my PC no crashes or performance issues in 16 hours.

Intro: I bought this game on sale and I highly recommend it on sale. I loved the old star wars franchise, not so much the new, but this is the best star wars we've gotten in games ever. I didn't like or finish the first game and I still thought this was a good idea. I also mostly played on Steam deck (As I travel for work) with no crashes or issues with the EA App (But I think I did start this on

They took everything cool from Fallen Order, doubled it, then went around and quietly fixed every single thing that gave me a migraine in the first game. A sequel that actually learned from its predecessor - this really happens? Unbelievable.

스타워즈 이야기로 이렇게 까지 재미없게 만들수가 있을까 ? 페르시아왕자 수준의 무의미 해보이는 길찾기루트 잡몹들과 굳이 이렇게 까지 신경써서 제다이가 싸워야 할까? 라는 생각이 드는 전투난이도 그런 잡몹들에게 한번 죽으면 저 멀리서 부터 다시 돌아와야하는 체크포인트 시스템 매력없고 못생긴 동료들 끝도 없이 한숨나오는 스타워즈 프렌차이즈 게임의 몰락 구공기의 매력적인 캐릭터들이 그립다.
I like jumping around and decimating my enemies with a lightsaber
The game is fantsatic all the different stances. one problem u can auto save so somtimwes when i did i got20 min back in game
스타워즈 파쿠르 게임 같은 느낌. 전작과 비슷하면서도 확연히 다름. 취향에 따라 전작이 더 나을 수도 있음.

If you liked Jedi: Fallen Order, this game is both more of the same and an expansion on the gameplay mechanics introduced in that game. One of my main quibbles with Fallen Order was that you didn't get a proper ranged attack, relying only on throwing your lightsaber to do any damage to enemies at a distance. This game remedies that by giving you a blaster stance, as well as other lightsaber stance

A little over 4 hours in and I have not experienced any stuttering, glitches, etc. that have been previously mentioned by others. So far I am enjoying this sequel to Fallen Order but will return to update the review if my feelings change or I run into issues!

액션, 탐험, 스타 워즈 세계관 등 정말 재미있는 게임인데 튕기네요. 아직 더 많은 최적화가 필요한 것 같습니다 ㅜㅜ 컴퓨터 맞춘지 꽤 오래되어서 옵션 타협하면서 게임 하는데 발열 및 튕김이 있네요. 최신 게임 중에 스텔라 블레이드 옵션 타협 후 플레이 했을 땐 아무 문제 없었어요. 전작에 비해 게임 편의성 및 액션은 더욱 좋아진 듯 합니다. 최적화 문제가 더 개선되어야 엔딩까지 무리없이 진행할 수 있을 것 같네요. 피드백 이후 더 많이 패치 되었으면 좋겠습니다.

Story is cool so far (6 hours in). One of the better Star Wars games I've played in a long time, at least since Fallen Order. Haven't ran into any performance issues as long as ray tracing is off. Ryzen 5 5600X RTX 3070ti

This game is LITERALLY out of this world! It is BEAUTIFUL and the story just got better compared to the first game (WHICH I ALSO LOVED!)! I absolutely recommend both games, ESPECIALLY this one! It has a compelling, captivating story, the graphics only improved, and the characters (new and old) have only improved/gotten more interesting! I cannot give this game any higher marks! Two thumbs up, 10/1
전작은 길찾기 때문에 짜증나는 요소가 많았는데 확실히 발전하고 재밌어짐
폴른 오더에서 약간 실망, 서바이버에서 매우 만족 - 모든 면에서 발전, 특히 그래픽(HDR 대만족)과 전투 스타워즈 좋아하면 더욱 강추.
fun game i enjoy having the ability to use a lightsaber and slice threw things its great
HUGE upgrade from the first release, loving this so far.
최적화는 좋다고는 말할수 없지만 액션성이나 서사 스토리 흐름은 최근게임과 비교해도 뒤쳐지지않는 최고의 게임. 강력추천합니다. 너무 저평가 되있어요

재밌습니다 더 좋아진 그래픽 , 빠른 이동 추가 , 개성있는 스탠스 추가 , 탈것을 이용한 기믹 , 추가된 이동 기술 등 이번 작품은 전 작품에 비해 훨씬 더 많은 것을 경험 시켜줍니다. 난해했던 이전 작과는 달리 맵이 좀 더 직관적이게 바뀌었고 빠른 이동이 추가되어 이동이 매우 편해졌습니다 덕분에 메인 이벤트가 끝나면 시작 위치까지 다시 걸어가야했던 전 작품과 달리 바로 돌아올 수 있어 너무 좋았습니다. 가장 큰 이슈였던 최적화 문제는 출시 이후 꽤나 시간이 지나서인지 저는 딱히 못 느꼈습니다 욕심 줄여서 레이트레이싱 끄고 전부 풀옵션으로 170 프레임 이상 방어 되더라구요. 컷신 중 가끔씩 늦게 불러와지는 주변 지형들 , 멋진 배경 그래픽에 비해 유독 해상도가 떨어져 보이는 일반 NPC들처럼 몰입을 방해
왠만한 스타워즈 영화보다 더 재미있는 내용에 집중력 있게 플레이 했다. 3부작으로 들었는데 벌써 세번째 타이틀이 기대된다. 가끔 게임을 하다 보면 버그들이 나타나는게 조금 거슬렸다.

It was an unforgettable journey through my beloved universe. After watching all the movies for the first time, I realized that I didn't have enough movies and needed more Star Wars content, so it led me to the first part of Fallen Order, which I generally liked, but not enthusiastically. And when I found out that there was a second one, I ran to pass it. And what was my surprise that the second pa
그대가 어린 시절 스타워즈를 보며 제다이를 꿈꿨다면, 침대에 누웠을 때 휴대폰이 책상에 있어 다시 일어나 가져가기 귀찮아 손을 뻗어 포스를 쓰는 상상을 한 적이 있다면, 이 게임은 그 부족함을 채워줄 것입니다. 포스가 그대와 함께하길.
1편도 재미있게 해서 질렀는데 역시나 만족. 파쿠르와 퍼즐을 할때는 내가 이걸 왜 샀을까 싶기도 하지만 그래도 길찾기도 쉬워지고 특히 다양한 스탠스를 통한 전투, 디테일 살아있는 스토리 좋았다. 크흐.

최적화 문제는 있지만 스토리, 액션, 비주얼 점수는 만점을 줘도 부족하지 않다고 생각합니다. 스타워즈 원작에선 보지 못한 행성의 분위기와 배경을 보여줘서 좋습니다. 칼의 여정이 앞으로 어떻게 진행될지, 그리고 원작과 연계는 어떻게 될지 기대가 됩니다. 다만 컴퓨터 사양이 좋지 않다면 최적화 문제때문에 원활한 게임 진행이 되지 않을 수도 있습니다. 그리고 중간에 버그로 인해서 다시 시작해야 하는 문제도 있었습니다. 발매된지 3년이 다 되어 가는데도 해결되지 않은 문제가 있어서 아쉽지만 그래도 추천합니다. 스타워즈 팬이라면 더더욱 강추입니다.
I love star wars, so im biased .but the game is fun challenge and also the story even being a sequel its great by its self.

A step up from Fallen Order in terms of gameplay and exploration. Really love the puzzles and similarities to metroidvanias. The characters really shine in this game, however I found the story to be one of the weaker aspects of the game. That problem can be alleviated by download the fix listed at PC Gaming Wiki here: https://www.pcgamingwiki.com/wiki/Star_Wars_Jedi:_Survivor#Enable_interpolated_rendering Second: There is an enemy that can stun lock you with what looks like an electrical pitchfork. IF you have rebound

전작의 맵은 탐험하다 보면 여기가 어디지, 하는 와중에 맨티스로 돌아가라고 해서 멘붕 오고 그랬는데, 이번 작품은 맵 구조도 그렇고 미니맵도 그렇고 편의성이 대폭 좋아졌습니다. 다만 쥰내 열심히 돌아다녔는데, 지름길 해제되고 보니 시작점 근처이고 그런 뺑뺑이 구조가 좀 많아서 살짝 허무한 감이 있습니다. 맵을 복잡하고 알뜰하게 쓴 거죠. 저는 전작의 맵도 좋았던 입장이라 뭐가 더 낫다고 하긴 어렵네요. 스토리 좋고 캐릭터성 좋고 눈도 즐겁습니다. 라세 뽕도 제대로군요. 스워 팬 아니어도 충분히 재밌게 하실 수 있습니다. 팬이면 더 좋을 거고요. 게임 내, 칼 커스텀에 제다이 옷 어두운 색 입히고 바람머리 헤어 하니까, 아나킨 같아져서 아주 설렙니다. 아직 다 깨기 전입니다. 아껴 하는 중.
insane story, still needs optimization but 99% of the time i had no issue, just that 1% percent was annoying, defo worth a buy on sale as with any game

This game is great. It builds on its predecessor in every way. This is a much better sequel than most in that regard. That said, the story is not as compelling as the original's. Game could also use more polishing. One or two crashes, and a few bugs here and there, but nothing that ruined the experience.

약간 억지스러운 길찾기나 퍼즐이 없는 건 아니다만 그 정도는 어떤 게임을 해도 한 두개씩은 걸리기 마련. 스토리, 연출, 월드 액션 등 액션 어드벤처(not 소울라이크) 장르로는 정말 맛있는 비빔밥! NPC들의 소소한 잡담을 듣는 재미도 좋고 뭔가 있을 것 같은데, 싶은 곳에 뭔가 있어서 항상 기대감이 충족된다. 서브퀘 빼고 메인만 하면 20시간 안팎으로 끝나는 이야기가 좀 아쉽긴 한데 여기저기 뛰어 놀기 좋은 놀이터는 상당하다.

Performance issues aside, I had a great time with this game, I enjoyed the story much more than the first game, loved the characters and the locations, traversal tech and combat felt better. Here's hoping we've got one more Cal Kestis adventure on the way to end this story.

The story is good combat is pretty much the same as Jedi Fallen Order but you can use many stance of the lightsaber and its fun. Story and combat solid as always, cant wait to see the sequel (if there will be a sequel in the future)
메인퀘만 쭉쭉 밀면서 하니 재밌네요. 특히 막바지에 몰아치는 상황과 전투는 정말 박진감 넘쳤습니다. 탐험과 서브퀘, 수집은 개인적으로 매력이 떨어졌습니다. 출시 초기 최적화 문제가 많았던 게임이라고 하는데 제가 할 때는 2번 정도 뻗었고 대체로 쾌적하게 플레이할 수 있었습니다.
I played this game at launch, it was extremely laggy but I still enjoyed it, coming back it runs much soother and is a great playthrough

The game is incredible. if it runs well on your PC:) Most negative reviews are just because the game itself has really many technical issues. With some minor tweaks I was able to play it and enjoy it, but still probably you will hit some problems playing it. Also, who says about bad optiomization - well, the only thing which really matters in most cases regarding this game - is VRAM amount. Even o

한마디로 재밌다. 다음 시리즈가 기다려진다. 최적화 이슈가 있는데 많이 개선된건지 게임을 포기할정도 아니였다. 1번은 튕기고, 한번은 다스베이더랑 싸울때 컴터 재부팅 1번됐다. 영상 프레임드랍은 제국군이 제다 침략할때 심하게 끊김 한번 발생. 그 이외에는 겜에 지장줄정도 발적화는 아니였다. ( 4070 super) 맵구조가 복잡해서 메인만 밀고 앤딩봤는데 영화와 같은 연출력과 수많은 광원효과, 수려한 풍경, 듀얼센서에서 느껴지는 광선검의 진동. 간만에 광월한 우주에서 광선검의 뽕맛을 봤다

This game utterly surprised me, i was quite hesitant to play this game seeing how bad the previous one was but after finally giving the sequel a try i can safely say this is a definite yes for me. Everything i complained about with the first game was fixed or tweaked to become better, it was as if my own review was brought up in a board meeting. 등신게임 첫스테이지에서 컷신에서만 계속 끊김 FG 설정하면 그거때문에 게임이 멈춤 RT 끄려고 설정하면 토글하다 멈춤 AMD FIDELITY 켜져있길래 끄고 DLSS 눌렀는데 멈춤 명상 2개 가면 멈추고 2개 가면 멈추고 무한반복 폴른오더때 좋은기억만 있어서 다시 해볼라고 샀는데 내 소중한 게임시간만 날림
w같은 키보드 조작 때문에 튜토리얼도 못 깸 ㅋㅋㅋ 아니 숙이는 키가 오른쪽 화살표인데 대체 뭔 키인데 이게? 패드 유저 가정하고 만들었다고? 지x 얘네도 펄없잆슶마냥 홍대병 걸린거지 ㅋㅋㅋ

Does not work on Steam Deck or Linux despite being "verified" due to being "forced" (budum-tssss) to use Publisher Application (EA App). Steam will not refund because it's been in my library for too long, despite only having 0.2 hours of trying to get it to work.

Respawn Entertainment still looks up to Dark Souls, but at the same time they try to make a hardcore game with the most softcore experience. For example, there’s always plenty of shortcuts, so Cal never loses much progress after his inevitable demise. [Issue#262, p.58]

Deep and tantalizing combat, enticing exploration, smooth platforming, and strong narrative moments lead the way in Star Wars Jedi: Survivor. This sequel improves nearly everything and only the suboptimal framerate leaves a sour taste.
The best Star Wars game of recent years is unfortunately plagued by serious technical problems that dampen the enjoyment.

Jedi: Survivor is a strong entry in the modern Star Wars canon, part of a new subsect of adventures in this universe finding ways to be sci-fi fantasy without ignoring the innate horror and banal evils inherent in the premise. The story paints an impressively dire picture of the new status quo in the galaxy, and it weaves in elegantly with the interactivity of the game, tying it directly into the

Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is an amazing game. I had a lot of fun with the new stances and the story is enthralling. If not for the performance issues, this game could have been easily among the best released this year.
pipeline_summary:
스타워즈 제다이: 서바이버는 전작보다 발전된 게임으로, 40시간가량 플레이하여 모든 콘텐츠를 완료할 수 있습니다.
장점: 전작보다 발전된 게임으로, 40시간가량 플레이하여 모든 콘텐츠를 완료할 수 있습니다. / 게임의 그래픽은 좋고, 최적화도 전작보다 개선되었습니다. / 맵이 더 직관적이게 바뀌었고 빠른 이동이 추가되어 이동이 매우 편해졌습니다.
단점: 한 리뷰는 여전히 최적화 문제를 경험하고 있습니다. / UI는 너무 불편하고 미니맵도 없습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 스타워즈 팬을 위한 즐거운 경험이지만, 최적화 문제와 버그가 있음

장점: 
- 개선된 그래픽과 연출
- 재미있는 전투와 탐험
- 풍부한 스타워즈 세계관과 이야기
- 다양한 스탠스와 커스터마이징 옵션

단점: 
- 심각한 최적화 문제와 프레임 드랍
- 빈번한 버그와 충돌
- 불편한 저장 시스템
- EA 앱 요구 사항으로 인한 불편함

title: Dave the Diver
sample_texts: 일단 처음은 참 재밌음 근데 어인족 마을이. 비주얼부터 퀘스트까지 진짜 좆같음 덩어리임 물 속이 살짝 질려갈 때 쯤 진짜 좆 같 은 심부름을 시키니까 확 지쳐버렸음
the black chef in the game makes me hard and ♥ everywhere, his big black booty is just too enticing
아 내가 졸라 힘들게 잡아온 물고기 버리지 말라고 시발 대머리새끼야
너무 재밌게 했구요, 초반부터 중반까지는 정말 빠져들면서 했지만 이후 종업원, 가게 업그레이드 싹다 밀어버리니깐 흥미가 떨어져서 게임 켜는게 너무 힘들게 다가왔어요 이젠 안켜게되네요. 살지말지는 본인판단이겠지만 저는 이 정도 가격대면 사도 괜찮다 생각해요 세일 자주하니깐 반값할인할때 구매해보세요^00^
This is a very addictive game. The objective and the wonderful underwater world will keep you hooked. My favourite are the cut scenes of Bancho
컨텐츠도 많고 되게 재밌는데 주인공이 너무 호구에요 챕터 5 부터는 끈기 없어지고 약간 흥미 떨어져서 간간히 하는중
탐험도 재밋는데 난 초밥집 경영이 제일 재밋다 지금 엔피시하나 직원되는지 모르고 직원 풀로 고용햇다가 쿡스타 승급못해서 직원 낭비중인데 누굴 짤라야할지 고민중 +어인족 카드게임 ㅈㄴ제밌음;;

I really love how immersive the game feels, and it’s easily one of the best RPGs I’ve played. The lore was surprisingly really good, and the cutscenes are so funny and entertaining. Bancho’s cutscenes are honestly the best hahaha. The gameplay is also very engaging — it can get a bit repetitive sometimes, but it’s still really enjoyable and worth playing. ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂)⸝♡
Im here to tell you that if you have second thoughts about getting the game just get it. The story is amazing It keeps you on your toes Gameplay addicting FREE GODZILLA DLC
this game is really fun :D there's a fun story and lots of stuff to do. i recommend ! !

I came for the interesting loop of fishing and then selling the fish that you catch. The depth of the story, and the number of mini-games keep me coming back though. Animation and soundtrack are pretty awesome as well. This is a great game that deserves all the hype and then some.
This game is surprisingly fun to play and for some reason I constantly find myself logging back in to play again.

I absolutely love this game! It's so much fun. I've played for 20 hours straight with no repetition and constantly updated content. It's a really beautiful game! | I love the animation in this game; it has a very unique style. It's a truly beautiful game. 10 / 10
This game has so much to do. Just when you think you'll get bored, something new pops up. I really recommend this game to everyone. Very fun and soothing.
Loved it the first time i played, still love it now! worth the purchase
20시간 플레이로 엔딩 봤어용 물질하는거 너무 재밌었고 브금들도 맘에드는것 많았어요
퀘스트 많은 게임 좋아하는 사람에게 딱임 개바빠서 좋음
재밌습니다! 컨텐츠도 다양하고 스토리도 매력적이에요. 사냥, 식당 영업, 스토리 같은 거 좋아하시면 추천합니다.

Very well done, with an amazing, unique gameplay loop that keeps me coming back. Just enough variety to keep it from getting boring but also not too much to prevent it from being a chore to learn. Struck a very nice balance here and is one of the best indie games of all time. Also if you have a Steam Deck, this is an absolute no brainer, as the Steam Deck enhances the entire experience even more.

This game keeps the excitement alive with new things and tasks every so often. And it is so relaxing to play. The music, the animation and the videos that come up every so often are so enjoyable. Highly recommend playing this with a controller rather than a keyboard.

it holds the same aspects of a hunting game with the animals that attack you if you get too close, such as the shark, lionfish, titan triggerfish, and so on, but also the aspects of a relaxing game with catching the other fish. as well of these, I like the idea of not having a health bar, but the oxygen you have is the your health. all in all, it holds many aspects for many different playing style
봄 할인도 하고 6월에 추가 DLC가 나온다길래 구입함. 출시한지 좀 됐는데 추가로 나온다? 이것 하나만으로도 박수받을만 함. 앞으로도 계속 나오길 바란다.
내가 좋아하는게 다있다. 바다, 다이빙, 물고기, 초밥, 픽셀 그래픽까지.. 완벽 그잡채. 완전히 취향 저격!
This is one of those game where you can simply sit back and relax. The gameplay, music, and characters are great. Highly recommended.

Under the sea, under the sea, what is that shark? why's it so large? WHY CHASING ME? (⊙_⊙;) A really fun game to play while unwinding, I was playing it on my Steam Deck (runs flawlessly btw) and I was having so much fun. The gameplay loop is easy and not long; for those of you that have work rotations this is a really good game to pick up as it doesn't take too much of your time. Performance is ex
This game is fun. All the mechanics that Ive interacted with in the game have been enjoyable. Hard to put down once you get into a rythem.
Good game, only 14 hours in the but diving is already getting a little repetitive. Every other aspect of the game is super fun and original

[h2] You are Dave. Dive. [/h2] The story is really good, there are lots of quests to keep you doing something. Sometimes, it would just be nice to dive without having to do quests everyday though. The quick time events or one of the cons, if you miss an attack in combat you have to do some button mashing of sorts to escape without losing copious amounts of oxygen. I'm currently on Chapter 5 and wo
사냥부터 장사까지 다양하게 지루하지 않음! 물고기 도감, 업그레이드 하는 맛도 있고 장사하는 것도 재밌음

I really like the game. It is nice in some ways if it interests you. Like fishing, farming, running/managing restaurant, absolutely great and I absolutely love it. However, some parts get boring fast. Dave's and other NPC's never ending/zero meaning comments, camera zoom in and out like a cutscene for not much reason, explaining me the simplest puzzle in the world with pop ups. In short, having yo

Like if Subnautica ate an edible. Those of us that have grown up with all of these 100+ hour games need games like this in our old age. Our backs are sore, hair is graying and we are not sure what video games are becoming but the last few years have shown they are becoming something a little worse than they were in my hey day. Unless you count all these little throwbacks, this game feels like it w

To be honest, if you don't control yourself and let your body get carried away by the fun of this game, your health will suffer. It starts with drowsiness (of course, if you have to work during the day and stay up late playing), and what follows is such severe eye strain that you'll have to wear sunglasses even on a day when the sun isn't bright at all. Consider yourself warned.
This game is a driving factor in me purchasing an AYN Thor. This $10 game has essentially committed me to a $400 console and I don't regret it at all.
very very good game, i trully love the art style, the comedy, and the gameplay

Genuinely amazed. I've seen the overwhelmingly positive rating for a couple years, but always looked at the game and was confused about what it was about. That's the magic. One minute your fighting a shark, the next your dancing in the audience at a concert, the next your farming, and the next your taking picture of a giant manta ray or riding a boluga. But it all makes sense, and its all done wit

Dave the Diver is a simple yet engaging game. Gameplay is split into two parts, the diving and restaurant management halves, and both are well done. The diving part is the more interesting part, essentially you explore the depths, catching fish and having adventures. There's things you need to find in order to fulfill certain missions, and other things you need to retrieve to participate in resear
peak but not really cus im underwater
Cozy-ish, I love that this game allows for both relaxing immersion and small challenges.

Don't usually play games that dont involve fps shooting but this game is insanely addictive and fun the loop is pretty solid im in the first area for 10 hours fishing and managing the shop, highly recommend.
물고기를 수집하고 다양한 레시피를 모으는 것은 정말 재미있다. 그러나 양식장이 나오기 전에 지루해서 지우는 사람들도 꽤 있을 것 같다.
Love this game, Played it a while upon release, but now I'm back to play it on Steam deck. perfect game to play while sitting on the couch with wife watching god knows what.
The group info only accepts messages from people in its organization or on its allowed senders list, and your email address isn't on the list.

So much to do and I'm only 9 hours in, very addicting. Definitely a little cheesy in it's uber-good-natured way, that Japanese style of story and prose, but totally fine. Can easily play with music or something and skim dialogue, etc. Awesome game.
전 엔딩까지 20시간쯤 걸렸는데 스토리만 빠릿하게 밀면 15시간 컷도 가능해보이네요. 딱 어인족 직전까지는 ㅈㄴ 재밌는데 그 이후는 좀 루즈해짐..

This game is amazing and addictive. It is very fun and one of my favorite games in awhile. My only critique is that the cut scenes feel forced upon me. They're very back to back and there is no way to control some of the sequences of the storyline's pacing. With all the different characters' side stories, it is overwhelming to receive them one after another.
I told my esports coach he looked like the protagonist He laughed and then later that day brought sushi 10/10
At fist.. I don't really expecting anything good. But I am very wrong, it is so addictive. The story line is kind of attractive and the pixelated rendering is quite cute.
I have not played much yet but so far it's very fun and i would recommend it for the art alone
Very relaxing and loads of fun, would definitely recommend.

just bought it. 4.6 hours just flew by. closed the game 10 mins ago and i'm already looking forward to playing it again. so far, really good, cant wait to play more and return to update this once i've finished

뭔가 힐링 겁나 되고 npc들 대화나 퀘스트, 컨셉 등이 너무 맘에 듦. 게임 문제는 아니고 그냥 내가 맘에 안드는 부분은 총기나 컨트롤 부분. 엘든링처럼 대시에 무적이 있는 것도 아니고 텔포를 하는 판정도 아니라 개쩌는 상어같은 보스들과의 전투가 살짝 아쉬웠음. 그리고 특정 퀘스트 위치를 모르겠어서 2시간동안 헤매서 결국 빡종했음. 위치 가이드가 필요한 나로썬 이것도 좀 아쉽넹
Great game, never gets old. The gameplay loop is also very satisfying.

what a fantastic game i loved everything about it, nothing to complain about at all the achievements weren't too extreme to do. The story was great always so much content and stuff to do i would recommend this game to anyone to play and its quite peaceful to play

[b]Dave the Diver[/b] is one of the best "casual" games out there! You play as [b]Dave the Diver[/b]. - *badum tzz* - and dive. obviously :D The gameplay is a satisfying loop: you dive in the morning & afternoon into a beautiful blue hole, which gets deeper and deeper as you progress, catching all kinds of fish and then using your catches to run a sushi bar in the evening. During the course of the

Dave The Diver was a great game to sit down and rewind after a tough day with. There's tons to do and tons to collect, the game can never truly be found boring in my opinion. If you've found yourself ever considering to playing, I'd suggest you give it a try, its more fun then you'll ever know.
I beat the game three years ago but I still hop on every so often to dive and make sushi. I absolutely love everything about this game and am stoked for the DLC.
게임 내내 지루한 시간이 한번도 없었던 갓겜이에요. 바다 속 탐험하면서 파밍하는 재미가 쏠쏠해요.
THE ARTSTYLE IS SO DAMN BEAUTIFUL and the gameplay loop is fun too, would recommend to anyone
Fun game, I like that there's so many things to collect and that it switches between diving in the ocean and managing the restaurant. The story is interesting with a bit of humour.

probably one of the best games ive ever played tbh. you wouldnt expect such a simple looking game to have THAT much content but theres so much to do and the story is actually pretty cool. i love everything about the game but the BEST thing about it is def the little cut scenes you get with the characters, the art style is very light hearted and intriguing (coming from a serial cut scene skipper)
It's just pretty dang neat. And chill, except for the boss battles sometimes can be very frustrating. But overall, really fun game.
돈값은 하는데 아쉬운 부분이 좀 있음 할인할 때 사면 할만함 추천
Chill and cozy game with plenty of content!! I cannot recommend it enough. <3
AMAZING game I love it so so much! Played it once and I'm going to go for another round. Just an all over gem, please play it! <3
Fun game! Looking forward to the DLC coming out in June
The best fishing game I ever played. It brought me SO MUCH JOY. Funny, pretty, colorful, creative, very complete in its gameplay. THIS IS THE GOAT !
Incredibly made, extremely polished, funny, and the story was super fun.
Does a lot with the time you are invested in it. Minigames, sub-missions, etc are all fun in their own way. Solid game all around
군대 전역하고 재밌게 했습니다. 유튜브 보니까 효율 좋게 플레이해서 진도가 다르네요. 저는 참치랑 상어 잡는게 너무 재밌어서 내내 그것만 했습니다.
Love this game. The gameplay loop is super addictive and the art style is really unique. 10/10 would recommend.
A very charming game. Starts out simple but gets INSANE.
꿀잼이긴한데 스토리가 가게운영에 비해 너무 짧아서 템포가 안맞음 이거만 잘 조절했으면 진짜 갓겜이었을듯

Went into Dave the Diver expecting a Dredge-type game and quickly realised how different it is. Hard to describe a game like this because there's so much to do and so many games within this game that you could spend countless hours on. Dave does most things well, story is surprisingly good, characters are interesting, music is great (LET THE SONGS PLAY WHEN I EXIT THE APP), and the art style is so
one of the best fishing games ive ever played, i love learning about the different fish species also ♥ you john watson
Very fun, and fun has not stopped.So much content.this is crazy.Crazy I tell you!
cute game, lots of different things to do, funny cutscenes
진짜 힐링게임임 근데 산소 부족한데 상어한테 잘못 걸리면 패닉 올수 있음 숨 쉬셈 게임이니까

The visuals are beautiful, and the gameplay loop is simple but surprisingly addictive. It can get repetitive after a while, yet it had me playing for 10 hours straight when I first downloaded it. My interest faded quickly afterward, but I still had a great time with it.
Absolutly great expirience of a game. Funny, calm, just vibes with great music and amazing animated shorts.
잼있다 일단 연출이 맛있음 아쉬운건 내가 엔딩까지 본 시점에서 저 넓은 블루홀속에서 올수집 까지 하기가 차마 손이 가지 않는다는거 그거 빼고는 스토리도 좋고 전체적으로 너무 좋은 게임임

An incredibly lovable game made by people who clearly love games. If I could only recommend one game for everyone to play, it would be this. Never met a game that is as sweet, earnest, and delightful as it is addicting.
This game makes me hungry I want sushi now ♥ dave
what a nice and cozy game. i absolutely love it. it has so much love you can also do alot. highly addictive :D
fantastic game ! great gamplay loop, funny dialogue, great leveling up experience !

Heard it was surprisingly good, and heard right! The graphics are charming - a mix of 3D models and 16-bit (maybe voxels too) - with some dynamic music and intriguing characters. The only cons I've encountered are a lot of screen tear (no V-sync option‽) and that there needs to be more player agency when it comes to cutscenes/plot. By this I mean that it's not always possible to pause, safely exit

Great game. Has all the right aspects of roguelite, restaurant sim, and tons of mini games. You'd be surprised how many boss fights there are. Not really challenging but very fun regardless, would definitely recommend
상당히 재밌다. 내 이름은 혜반쵸. 누구보다 열심히 상어를 잡고 비싼 초밥을 내놓으며 많은 돈을 벌기 위해 계획적으로 초밥집을 운영하고 있다. 중간중간 나오는 무서운 공룡이나.. 상어나.. 그들은 나의 가슴을 쫄깃하게 만든다. like 마귀상어 너희는 다 내 작살 안에 있다. 이 게임을 알려준 나의 걸후란드에게 감사함을 표하며.
absolute peak so much content for a 2d pixel game is crazy I could recommend this to everyone and for 20 bucks it's definitely worth it

Super cool. Love it. There's no other game like dave the diver. "Cozy game" is an extremely broad category that it fits in. Its and adventure, and an awesome story. There's awesome free dlc, and they still are coming out with more dlc that I'm excited about. The worst thing about dave the diver is that I'll never be able to play it again for the first time.
분량을 늘려서 더 나빠진 듯한 게임. 하고 싶은게 많았고 나눠서 보면 훌륭하지만, 사공이 많다보니 배가 산으로 갔다. 재밌어서 더 아쉬운 게임.
잘 만든 수십 시간짜리 숙제겜. 조금 더 컴팩트하게 만들었으면 좋았을 것 같다.
초중반까지 오지게 달리다가 후반부에 힘빠질 때 스토리도 같이 끝낸 느낌 식당 운영은 솔직히 그렇게 큰 재미는 못 느꼈지만 바다 속 다양한 생물들 접하는 묘미 그 하나가 너무 짜릿했던 게임
i love this game. so funny. endless content, constantly pleasantly surprised by new mini game scenarios and plot is awesome.

45% 할인된 가격인 13,200원에 구매했습니다. 메인 챕터에만 집중한다면 플레이 타임은 약 30시간 내외일 것으로 보입니다. 하지만 이 게임은 메인 스토리 외에도 타이쿤 요소가 포함되어 있어, 플레이 타임이 자연스럽게 분산되도록 설계되어 있습니다. 실제로 저는 메인 챕터를 진행하는 과정에서 오히려 탐사와 식당 운영에 매력을 느껴 이를 우선순위에 두고 즐겼습니다. 게임의 재미는 역시 명성 그대로였습니다. 타이쿤 요소를 적절히 융합한 시스템이 매우 훌륭했고, 스토리 또한 몰입감이 높았습니다. 엔딩 이후에도 타이쿤 콘텐츠를 통해 게임을 더 즐길 수 있다는 점이 좋았습니다. 저 역시 엔딩 이후 식당 운영을 더 이어갔으나, 스토리가 마무리되자 목적의식이 희미해지며 반복되는 패턴에 다소 빠르게 피로감을 느꼈습니다.

Dave The Diver very much deserves the enormous success it’s received in its first month, selling over a million copies, and hopefully making developers Mintrocket enormously rich. They’ve created something really special, an RPG-meets-Diner Dash-meets gentle SCUBA sim, that manages to feel utterly crammed to the gills with things to do, yet joyfully relaxing to play.

What makes Dave the Diver work so well is wanting to see what comes next. In another game that just tacked on mechanics and plot devices with no plan, it could feel like the padding around a threadbare premise. But Dave’s kitchen sink approach somehow feels like a perfectly logical, if absurd, escalation — like a Tim Robinson sketch in game form. It’s a teetering pile of mechanics and minigames th

As you’ll notice quickly in Dave the Diver, the artists did a fantastic job. The blend of 3D models and 2D sprites make for great visuals throughout the game. The pixel art character animations in cutscenes were impressive and endearing. There are many different sea creatures and environments to discover, along with different methods to catch certain types of sea creatures. The sushi restaurant gi

An absolutely delightful game. Its adorable and the characters are loveable. It also has an insane amount of content like you couldn't believe. This is no small game. Prepare to dedicate hours of your life to it.

I initially expected Dave the Diver to be a straightforward game about catching fish and running a sushi restaurant. However, it is so much deeper than that, and the references throughout the game are excellent.

Really fun indie game about a dude who goes underwater to collect fish and sustain his Sushi restaurant out somewhere in a tropical/resort-like setting. There are subtle themes of Japanese culture, and i think its a pretty good game to play if you want some kind of Stardew Valley-est vibe where you can turn your brain off for some parts and chill.

The game is great, BUT I had tons of fun on this game, i played nonestop but after a certain number of hours it ends up being a giant fetch-quest game. and it unfortunately, for me, became insufferable. I dont believe I finished the game fully. I wish there was about 50% more of the sushi bar, because you spend 2 or 3 dives (been awhile) and all this time collecting fish and doing quests, to spend
I love diving. I love Dave. I love sushi. I love the story. I love the art style. I love love love the soundtracks!
The perfect combination of action and chill. For the busy person I am, with almost no spare time.. this is very easy to just start and stop.

Peak game. I love the big variety of game mechanics here, some characters, beautiful graphics and the atmosphere that this game has. Plus, I've never been so invested in getting all of the achievements like I was in "Dave the diver" :D Sure, some parts were frustrating and confusing, but it's forgivable as there are only a few of such moments in the entire game, which is very long. I would recomme

very good indie game, it's like two games at once, a fully detailed diving game, and a fully detailed Management game,
I love this game my friend gifted it to me, i love the vibe of the game so chill and the animation of pixels i felt so excited whenever I see it. The quality is absolutely good :3
He's dave and he dives what more can u ask for
Fun little game. For the size and asking price of the game, it can get pretty deep(pun intended). I play this on a Rog Xbox ally, the base model and it runs perfectly with full controller support.
A nice chill game with anxiety inducing fish hunting session

How best to describe the game? You are an obese Athlete, a so called diver. You need to annhilate opposing enemy fish with a device that they call harpoon. Annihilated fish is then repurposed by some kind of a non-asian ninja into food that you need to offer to other humans. Your whale-like body attracts dolphins. they are your friends. you do not shoot friends with a harpoon. only the other fish.
너무 무겁지도 않고 잔잔하게 즐길 수 있는 게임. 추천합니다.
in a time of great suffering and pain, where most games devolve into sweat fueled shouting and rage, there is a comfort to know there is a nice and peaceful game where you hunt fish and serve sushi.

I just don't see what others love about this game. It reminds me of early side scrollers back in the early '90s. It's basic, go here, do that. I suppose if you want to play a game where you run a sushi bar it could be interesting, but I found it tedious.

Dave the Diver is an excellent, enormous title that is best left as vague as possible. Go in without looking too deeply into it and be ready for dozens of hours of some of the best that video gaming has to offer.
Dave the Diver is an eventful experience where every new dive is an adventure of its own that always come hand in hand with an unexpected plot developments.

In a world full of fear and uncertainty, Dave the Diver is here to offer a lighthearted story and engaging gameplay. It doesn’t try to follow trends or emulate big AAA titles. It doesn’t have an in-game shop to try to get you to spend more money. It’s simply a silly, fun game about a diver named Dave, and I can’t put it down.

Dave the Diver is an absolute must-play if you are in the mood for some sushi and relaxation. It has its tense moments, but with its beautiful surroundings, an absurd amount of activities, and just pure hearted and wholesome nature, you will be sucked into this magical lagoon of heavenly food and fun.

Dave the Diver is the right indie game at the right time. In a year full of great releases, Mintrocket shows us the worth of a simple and relaxed experience, that truly feels like a pleasure to sit down and play.

This is demanding work, but the game’s distinct but complementary loops of playful labour are highly compelling. The satisfaction of completing a challenging dive without needing to be rescued, then watching the rave reviews on “Cooksta” pour in, is profound. Stylish, witty and exquisitely designed, Dave the Diver uses several hooks to achieve its goal, while establishing the relationship between

Dave The Diver is a true indie gem. The story acts as the glue that holds things together while most of the weight of the game is on the shoulders of gameplay mechanics that are gradually added, new areas that are unlocked in each chapter of the story, and new weapons and equipment that can be found in boxes scattered in the Blue Hole. This game is a simple delight like a cup of coffee in the morn
Dave the Diver is a great adventure with many elements from other genres, so it never gets boring. Only the control with mouse and keyboard takes some getting used to.
pipeline_summary:
다이브 인 데이브는 탐험 콘텐츠와 재미있는 게임플레이를 제공하며, 아름다운 픽셀 그래픽과 매력적인 사운드로 쾌적한 경험을 제공합니다.
장점: 탐험 콘텐츠와 재미있는 게임플레이를 제공합니다. / 바다, 다이빙, 물고기, 초밥, 픽셀 그래픽으로 완벽합니다. / 할인할 때 구매하면 가치 있는 게임입니다.
단점: 한 리뷰는 게임의 콘텐츠가 너무 많고 깊이가 얕다고 비판했습니다. / 한 리뷰는 게임의 특정 구간에서 지루함을 느꼈습니다. / 게임의 진행 장벽이 낮고, 특정 구간에서 어려움을 느꼈습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 다채로운 콘텐츠와 매력적인 그래픽으로 구성된 힐링 게임으로, 다이빙과 식당 운영을 통해 다양한 경험을 제공한다.

장점: 
- 독특하고 매력적인 그래픽 스타일
- 다이빙과 식당 운영을 결합한 중독성 있는 게임플레이
- 다양한 미니 게임과 활동이 포함된 방대한 콘텐츠
- 매력적인 스토리와 캐릭터

단점: 
- 일부 플레이어에게 반복적인 게임플레이로 느껴질 수 있음
- 후반부로 갈수록 지루함이 느껴질 수 있음
- 멀티플레이 지원이 없음

title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33

게임 볼륨과 세계관에 비해 전개되는 얘기가 너무나 작아진다. 떡밥은 깔려있었다고 하긴 해도, 떡밥 분석해서 스토리 예측에 성공한 입장에서 봐도 별로였다. 세계의 비밀에 대한 얘기를 흥미롭게 풀만한 생각을 못 내서 이런 스토리가 나온 것 같다. 설정을 설정으로 덮어씌우는 느낌이 들었다. 가지고 있는 능력에 비해 너무 인간적이게 느껴지기고 했고, 등장인물들의 반응도 와닿지 않았다. 이야기가 진행될 수록 어느 캐릭터에게도 몰입할 수 없게 되어갔다. 지극히 서양스러운 스토리라는 느낌. 전문가 모드로 1회차 다 밀었는데 게임은 재밌다. 브금은 좋긴한데 다 분위기가 비슷해서 특색있게 기억 남는건 없는 듯.

[h1] GOTY급은 절대로 아님 [/h1] 할만하냐 아니냐 하면 할만은 한데, 몇몇 단점이 너무 크게 다가와서 솔직히 남한테 추천하고 싶은 게임은 아님. 이게 왜 GOTY? 첫째로 시인성 가시성이 최악임. 어느 맵구간이고 가릴 거 없이 그림자 지거나 어두운 부분으로 들어가면 밑바닥이 전혀 안 보여서 그냥 길 걷는 게 너무 귀찮고 짜증남. 밝기를 일부러 2.5로 올리고 했는데도 광원처리가 최악임. 맵이 복잡하지도 않은데 그냥 보이지가 않아서 길 돌아다니기가 싫은 경험은 색다르긴 한데 정말 빡침. 둘째로 패링 회피 개념을 턴제에 넣은 건 좋은데 활용법이 화나게 만듬. 후반부로 갈수록 엇박 쓰는 얘들이 늘어나는데 이게 시각적 효과+청각적 효과가 실제 내 패리 타이밍이랑 안 맞음. 아니면 너무 빨라서 패턴 외워서

Very occasionally, I'll play an RPG that makes me feel ten again. Rebirth. Cris Tales. Revisiting Suikoden. Years come, the big number ticks down, and comfortable appreciation replaces the spellbound enchantment of being told a story, of being swept off to a new world. Of playing Final Fantasy 8 in that special edition shirt that Ben Starr likes to wear that I wish I'd kept because I bet it's wort

But it’s also a story of perseverance. Of pushing forward even when it feels impossible. Of carrying the weight of sorrow without letting it define you. And daring to believe in a future no one has ever seen – simply because someone has to. And that’s what makes Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 so quietly powerful, and such a stroke of brilliance in this medium.

Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a graphically beautiful game, but despite its glowing reputation, it does little to innovate within the RPG genre. The lack of navigation tools makes exploring its world incredibly frustrating, and the story only starts to get interesting near the very end.

Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a competent new JRPG with which genre fans will likely be pleased. However, it does very little to iterate on the foundation laid by those that came before it. Instead, it’s content to offer its flavor of what has worked before.
Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a beautiful RPG with exciting combat, excellent voice work, and a fantastic score, but design constraints may turn off genre fans seeking a grand adventure.
Beautiful game with great story and fun combat. Great story in the understatement of the century but was very good

pipeline_summary:
클레어 옵스큐어: 익스페디션 33은 아름다운 그래픽과 사운드로 몰입감 있는 경험을 제공하며, 턴제 게임이라는 장르를 탈피한 새로운 전투 방식을 제공합니다.
장점: 흥미로운 캐릭터와 이야기가 잘 작성되었습니다. / 중반까지 몰입감 있는 스토리를 제공합니다. / 플레이 흐름을 익힌 뒤 클리어까지 이어졌다는 반응이 있습니다. / 직접 해보라고 권할 만큼 재미있다는 반응이 있습니다. / 시간이 빠르게 지나갈 만큼 몰입감이 있다는 반응이 있습니다.
단점: UI 디자인이 성의없고 초반부터 미친듯이 질주하는 NPC가 있습니다. / 환경 사운드가 빈약한 편입니다. / 진행 장벽이 소울-like한 스트레스를 제공합니다. / 게임이 막장 드라마처럼 느껴질 수 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 클레어 옵스큐어: 익스페디션 33은 아름다운 그래픽, 감동적인 스토리, 중독성 있는 턴제 전투 시스템을 갖춘 게임으로, 플레이어를 감정적으로 몰입하게 만드는 뛰어난 게임입니다.

장점: 
- 아름다운 그래픽과 몽환적인 세계관
- 감동적인 스토리와 캐릭터
- 중독성 있는 턴제 전투 시스템
- 우수한 음악과 사운드 디자인

단점: 
- 일부 플레이어에게 어려울 수 있는 높은 난이도
- 미니맵이 없어서 길을 찾기 어려울 때가 있음
- 일부 플레이어는 스토리가 예측 가능하다고 느낌

Tekken was my first fighting game, and it's always been my favorite series. 1, 2, 3, Tag. All incredible games. You need to be a f*cking Harvard student to understand the moves in this game. But it is kinda fun ngl, even tho I loose every friking game.

Even if you’re not a fan of the online competitive scene, Tekken 8 has a lot of content to offer: assisted mode that is great for parties, a story campaign, and an absolutely fantastic Arcade mode that features its own story and unobtrusively helps you become a better player. [Issue#263, p.36]

Tekken 8 is another impressive addition to Bandai Namco's highly successful line-up of famous fighting games, combining abundant content and a very entertaining "easy-to-learn/hard-to-master" gameplay.

Tekken 8 blew us away with its excellent, engaging features that are fine-tuned to fit every fighting game fan's preference. It also offers a battle system that new and veteran players can enjoy.as long as you can take the Heat.
A masterclass in fighting game design, perfect for both new and old players alike.

TEKKEN 8 hits hard with what could quite possibly be the best TEKKEN entry to date. Fresher than newcomer Azucena’s signature coffee blend, this title does everything in its power to make this King of Iron Fist tournament worthy of all players.

With Tekken 8, Bandai Namco takes everything that was good about its predecessor and ups the ante on most things. While it’s not a revolutionary sequel, all the improvements make Tekken 8 a must-have for fighting fans – whether you play to be the best or just for fun.

Good story mode, fun gameplay, great training modes, near perfect online mode, plenty of fighters to choose and detailed customization options. Tekken 8 is an ideal package with everything I could want from a fighting game.

Tekken 8 is an example of a game living up to it's own hype. With a fantastic roster of warriors, amazing single and multi-player modes, great online connectivity and incredible graphics and sound, Tekken 8 solidifies itself as one of the best in the business and an excellence of execution.
The most accessible, most extensive and currently simply the best fighting game on consoles - the PC version noticeably lags behind online.

Having now spent enough time online and offline with Tekken 8 across Steam Deck, PS5, and Xbox Series X, I can safely say that Bandai Namco Studios hit it out of the park with this one. It is a universal improvement over the last game and delivers a superb package right from day one. While it has a few things I’d like to see fixed in updates, Tekken 8 gets my highest possible recommendation right

Tekken 8 brings everything you desire from a new game in the franchise. A fantastic story mode, lots of options, fighters and possibilities. Fine, refreshing gameplay and good online functionalities. The few minor downsides the game has are that the character customization isn't that captivating and the rollback netcode could be just a little bit better for the perfect experience. That being said,

Tekken 8 is a stellar entry to the series with something for everyone. Whether you're a grizzled veteran or just want to play as the guy who looks like Bruce Lee, there's never been a better time to enjoy the King of Iron Fist tournament.

Tekken 8 is excellent. The fighting is just as crisp as ever, and the addition of the Heat mechanic and an increased focus on aggression create a game that feels both exciting to play and watch. The bevy of new modes was what the game needed at launch, and there's more than enough content to keep players busy without feeling like every facet of the title had been explored. The fighting game scene

Tekken 8 is the ultimate Tekken game. A glossy veneer of modernity encases a strong foundation that builds upon its predecessors to great success. In every regard, Tekken 8 matches and surpasses the very best that the series, and the fighting game genre as a whole, has to offer.

Featuring cutting-edge visuals for fighting games and exceptional learning tools, Tekken 8 stands out as one of the best releases in the fighting game genre over the last few years. While the netcode is generally acceptable, regrettably, it falls short of replicating the seamless offline experience. This drawback significantly affects the overall experience, way more than the limited amount of sin

Tekken 8 improves on its predecessor with a complete graphics overhaul, drastically improved netcode, and a robust base game package featuring 32 characters and 16 stages. With DLC fighters already in the pipeline, there’s more than enough content to keep fighting game fans packing punches for the foreseeable future.

If this review appears glowing, frankly that's how I feel about the game. It's without a doubt my favourite fighting game out right now, and I've been fiending to get back online ever since they took the pre-release servers down. The one scratch on the game's spotless form is online infrastructure that doesn't quite live up to other games on the market right now, which makes it hard to recommend t
The best Tekken game in years, let down only by its struggling netcode and aged customisation.
pipeline_summary:
TEKKEN 8은 개선된 조작감과 탐험 콘텐츠로 많은 유저들이 즐기고 있지만, 일부 유저들은 진행 장벽과 밸런스 조절에 대해 불만을 제기하고 있습니다.
장점: 조작감이 편리해져 입문하기 좋은 게임입니다. / 많은 유저들이 즐기고 있으며, 커뮤니티가 활성화되어 있습니다. / 진행 장벽과 밸런스 조절에 대한 개선이 이루어지고 있습니다.
단점: 고질적인 문제인 키 씹힘 문제가 여전히 존재합니다. / 가격 정책에 대한 비판이 있습니다. 캐릭터 구매를 위한 추가 비용이 필요합니다. / 진행 장벽과 진입 장벽에 대한 우려가 있습니다. / 랭크 매치에서의 자동 콤보 사용과 캐릭터 밸런스 등에 문제가 있습니다.
baseline_summary:
한줄평: 철권 시리즈의 최신작으로, 그래픽과 게임플레이는 좋지만 밸런스와 DLC 가격 등의 문제로 논란이 있는 게임

장점: 
- 그래픽과 시각 효과가 우수함
- 게임플레이가 재미있고, 특히 초보자에게 친절함
- 다양한 캐릭터와 커스터마이징 옵션 제공
- 오프라인 모드에서 친구들과 플레이하기 좋음

단점: 
- 밸런스 문제가 심각함, 특히 상위 티어 캐릭터들이 너무 강함
- DLC 가격이 너무 비싸다는 비판이 있음
- 온라인 모드에서 렉과 매칭 문제가 있음
- 일부 플레이어들이 게임에 부정적인 경험을 가지고 있음
